Experimental results provide new insights into the trade-offs between model architecture, model size, and the influence between different tasks, highlighting the potential of lightweight LLMs in judicial AI applications. The source code is anonymously available at \url{https://github.com/ZhitianHou/CVGEvalKit}

</details>


### [326] [AgentKernelArena: Generalization-Aware Benchmarking of GPU Kernel Optimization Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16819)
*Sharareh Younesian,Wenwen Ouyang,Sina Rafati,Mehdi Rezagholizadeh,Sharon Zhou,Ji Liu,Yue Liu,Yuchen Yang,Hao Li,Ziqiong Liu,Dong Li,Vikram Appia,Zhenyu Gu,Emad Barsoum*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了AgentKernelArena，一个用于评测AI编程代理在GPU内核优化任务上能力的开源基准测试，包含196个任务和未见配置泛化测试，发现当前最强代理在PyTorch-to-HIP和HIP-to-HIP任务上能实现约6.8倍加速，但在泛化到未见输入形状时存在正确率下降问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的内核基准测试仅评估单次LLM调用，无法评测完整的代理工作流（迭代读取代码、调用编译器和性能分析器、优化实现），且缺乏对未见配置泛化能力的测试。

Method: 构建包含196个任务的基准测试，涵盖HIP-to-HIP优化、Triton-to-Triton优化和PyTorch-to-HIP翻译三类任务，在隔离工作区中通过门控编译、正确性和性能检查、集中评分以及未见配置泛化协议来评估完整代理工作流。

Result: 最强配置在PyTorch-to-HIP上实现6.89x加速，HIP-to-HIP上6.69x，Triton-to-Triton上2.13x；未见配置泛化测试中，后两类优化基本保持可迁移性，但PyTorch-to-HIP的正确率显著下降，表明代理常硬编码形状相关假设。

Conclusion: AgentKernelArena是一个模块化、可扩展的框架，可用于对GPU内核优化的AI代理进行严格评测，揭示了当前代理在泛化能力上的局限性。

Abstract: GPU kernel optimization is increasingly critical for efficient deep learning systems, but writing high-performance kernels still requires substantial low-level expertise. Recent AI coding agents can iteratively read code, invoke compilers and profilers, and refine implementations, yet existing kernel benchmarks evaluate single LLM calls rather than full agent workflows, and none include both kernel-to-kernel optimization and unseen-configuration generalization testing. We present AgentKernelArena, an open-source benchmark for measuring AI coding agents on GPU kernel optimization. The benchmark contains 196 tasks spanning HIP-to-HIP optimization, Triton-to-Triton optimization, and PyTorch-to-HIP translation, and evaluates complete agent workflows in isolated workspaces using gated compilation, correctness, and performance checks, centralized scoring and an unseen-configuration generalization protocol that tests whether optimizations transfer to input configurations the agent never observed. Across production agents including Cursor Agent, Claude Code, and Codex Agent, we find near-perfect compilation and high correctness rates on most task categories, with the strongest configurations achieving mean speedups of up to 6.89x on PyTorch-to-HIP, 6.69x on HIP-to-HIP, and 2.13x on Triton-to-Triton tasks. Our unseen-configuration evaluation shows that HIP-to-HIP and Triton-to-Triton optimizations largely transfer to unseen input shapes, while PyTorch-to-HIP exhibits substantial correctness drops, indicating that agents generating kernels from scratch frequently hardcode shape-specific assumptions. AgentKernelArena is designed as a modular, extensible framework for rigorous evaluation of agentic GPU kernel optimization across agents, tasks, and hardware targets.

</details>


### [327] [Constrained Code Generation with Discrete Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16829)
*Lize Shao,Michael Cardei,Zichen Xie,Ferdinando Fioretto,Wenxi Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出CDC框架，将约束满足直接集成到离散扩散模型的反向去噪过程中，通过无训练的神经营销推理，在代码生成中提升功能正确性、安全性和语法约束的满足度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离散扩散模型在代码生成中展现出迭代精炼和并行令牌优化的能力，但现有方法缺乏在生成过程中有效嵌入程序级功能和安全性约束的机制。作者旨在利用扩散模型每一步暴露的全局程序状态，作为自然干预点来引导生成。

Method: 提出Constrained Diffusion for Code (CDC)，一种无训练的神经营销推理框架。它通过约束感知的去噪算子，结合数学优化和程序分析，识别中间程序状态中与约束相关的区域，并局部调整去噪轨迹，在保持接近基础模型的同时引导生成朝向可行程序。

Result: 在多个代码生成基准测试中，CDC在功能正确性、安全性和语法约束满足度上均优于离散扩散和自回归基线方法，且所需修正计算更少、编辑更局部化。

Conclusion: 将约束直接集成到扩散模型的反向过程中是一种有效且高效的代码生成策略，能够在最终代码提交前引导生成，兼顾性能与约束满足。

Abstract: Discrete diffusion models are a powerful, emerging paradigm for code generation. They construct programs through iterative refinement of partially corrupted token sequences and enable parallel token refinement. Importantly, this paradigm exposes a global program state at each denoising step, which provides a natural intervention point for enforcing program-level functionality and security constraints, guiding the generation before the final code is committed. Building on this observation, the paper introduces Constrained Diffusion for Code (CDC), a training-free neurosymbolic inference framework that integrates constraint satisfaction directly into the reverse denoising process. CDC augments the base discrete diffusion sampler with constraint-aware denoising operators that combine mathematical optimization with program analysis to identify constraint-relevant regions of the intermediate program state and locally adjust the denoising trajectory, steering generation toward feasible programs while remaining close to the base model. Across code generation benchmarks, CDC consistently improves constraint satisfaction in functional correctness, security, and even syntax, outperforming discrete diffusion and autoregressive baselines with less corrective computation and more localized edits.

</details>


### [328] [CompactAttention: Accelerating Chunked Prefill with Block-Union KV Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16839)
*Jiwon Song,Dongwon Jo,Beomseok Kang,Jae-Joon Kim*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出CompactAttention，一种基于Block-Union KV Selection的分块预填注意力机制，通过将2D块稀疏掩码转换为GQA感知的逐组KV块表，实现无需显式KV压缩的高效注意力计算，在128K上下文长度下取得2.72倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有稀疏注意力方法主要针对一次性预填设计，无法高效迁移到分块预填场景：块稀疏内核在查询长度受限于块大小时效率低下，细粒度模式搜索在每块累积KV缓存时成本过高。QUOKA虽直接针对分块预填，但依赖查询子采样和逐token的KV选择，可能遗漏查询特定的KV条目并引入显式KV复制开销。

Method: 将2D块稀疏掩码视为KV选择信号而非直接的内核执行计划，通过Q块合并和组内合并构造GQA感知的逐组KV块表，在分页执行约束下生成保留输入掩码所选所有KV块的最小块表，使选中的KV块可在原位访问而无需显式KV压缩。

Result: 在LLaMA-3.1-8B-Instruct上，CompactAttention在RULER基准测试中保持接近密集注意力的精度，同时在128K上下文长度的分块预填下实现高达2.72倍的注意力加速。

Conclusion: CompactAttention通过Block-Union KV Selection有效解决了分块预填场景下稀疏注意力的效率问题，兼顾了精度与速度，为长上下文大模型的高效服务提供了新方案。

Abstract: Chunked prefill has become a widely adopted serving strategy for long-context large language models, but efficient attention computation in this regime remains challenging. Existing sparse attention methods are primarily designed for one-shot prefill and do not translate efficiently to chunked prefill: block-sparse kernels lose efficiency when the query length is limited by the chunk size, while fine-grained pattern search becomes costly when repeated over the accumulated KV cache at every chunk. QUOKA, a recent method that directly targets chunked prefill, avoids sparse-kernel overhead but relies on query-subsampled, token-level KV selection, which can miss query-specific KV entries and introduce explicit KV-copy overhead. To address these limitations, we propose CompactAttention, a chunked-prefill attention mechanism based on Block-Union KV Selection. CompactAttention treats 2D block-sparse masks as KV-selection signals rather than direct sparse-kernel execution plans, and converts them into GQA-aware per-group KV block tables through Q-block union and intra-group union. This construction produces the minimal block tables that preserve all KV blocks selected by the input masks under paged execution constraints, enabling selected KV blocks to be accessed in place without explicit KV compaction. On LLaMA-3.1-8B-Instruct, CompactAttention maintains accuracy close to dense attention on the RULER benchmark while delivering up to 2.72$\times$ attention speedup at 128K context length under chunked prefill.

</details>


### [329] [RTI-Bench: A Structured Dataset for Indian Right-to-Information Decision Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16843)
*Joy Bose*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文构建了印度《知情权法》行政决定的结构化数据集RTI-Bench，包含1,516份裁决，涵盖结果标签、豁免引用、IRAC推理组件等字段，零样本Mistral 7B基线在结果预测上达到57.3%准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 印度《知情权法》赋予公民信息请求权，但中央信息委员会的裁决使用晦涩的行政语言，普通民众难以理解，也无法判断上诉是否有价值。现有缺乏结构化的数据集来支持自动分析。

Method: 从两个来源构建RTI-Bench：（1）1,218个指令-回复语料（通过规则抽取添加结构字段）；（2）298份从委员会门户收集的PDF裁决（涵盖5位委员、3种文档格式，时间跨度为2023-2026年）。包含结果标签、豁免引用、IRAC推理组件和程序时间线等结构化字段。

Result: 指令-回复语料标签覆盖率达89%；PDF子集（239份初裁）首次发布覆盖率为51%；人工审查50份样本标签精度为95.3%。零样本Mistral 7B在100个案例上达到57.3%准确率和37.0%宏F1值，显著高于多数类基线（14.3%宏F1）。

Conclusion: RTI-Bench作为首个公开的印度RTI行政决定结构化数据集，验证了利用该数据集进行自动结果预测的可行性，为提升行政决策透明度和可访问性提供了基础资源。

Abstract: India's Right to Information Act, 2005 gives every citizen the right to demand information from public authorities, yet in practice most people cannot make sense of the dense administrative language used in Central Information Commission (CIC) decisions, let alone predict whether an appeal is worth filing. This paper introduces RTI-Bench, a structured dataset of CIC decisions with outcome labels, exemption citations, IRAC-style reasoning components, and procedural timelines. To the best of our knowledge it is the first publicly released structured dataset for Indian RTI administrative decisions. The dataset draws from two sources: 1,218 cases from a publicly available instruction-response corpus (with structured fields added through rule-based extraction), and 298 CIC decision PDFs collected directly from the Commission portal, spanning five commissioners and three document format generations from 2023 to 2026. Label coverage reaches 89% on the instruction-response corpus. For the PDF subset of 239 primary decisions, coverage is 51% in this first release. A random sample of 50 labelled cases was manually reviewed, yielding a label precision of 95.3%. A zero-shot Mistral 7B baseline on 100 cases gives 57.3% accuracy and 37.0% macro-F1 on outcome prediction, well above the majority-class baseline of 14.3% macro-F1. RTI-Bench is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/joyboseroy/rti-bench

</details>


### [330] [MixSD: Mixed Contextual Self-Distillation for Knowledge Injection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16865)
*Jiarui Liu,Lechen Zhang,Yongjin Yang,Yinghui He,Yingheng Wang,Weihao Xuan,Zhijing Jin,Mona Diab*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出MixSD方法，通过混合基础模型自身的专家条件（含注入事实）和朴素条件（原始先验）来动态构建监督信号，使微调目标更贴近模型的生成分布，从而在注入新知识的同时有效保留预训练能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准SFT在注入新知识时，由于微调目标（来自人类或外部系统）与模型的自回归分布不一致，导致优化器被迫模仿低概率token序列，从而造成预训练能力（如推理和通用性能）严重退化（灾难性遗忘）。

Method: MixSD：无需外部教师，动态混合基础模型自身的两个条件——专家条件（上下文中观察到注入事实）和朴素条件（反映原始先验），构建接近基础模型分布的监督序列，同时保留事实学习信号。

Result: 在合成语料（事实回忆、算术函数获取）和多个开放域基准上，MixSD相比SFT和on-policy自蒸馏基线始终取得更好的记忆-保留权衡；保留高达100%的保留能力同时保持近乎完美的训练准确率，而标准SFT仅保留1%。生成的监督目标在基础模型下具有更低的负对数似然，且减少了对Fisher敏感参数方向的有害移动。

Conclusion: 使监督信号与模型原生生成分布对齐是知识注入中缓解灾难性遗忘的简单而有效的原则。

Abstract: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) is widely used to inject new knowledge into language models, but it often degrades pretrained capabilities such as reasoning and general-domain performance. We argue this forgetting arises because fine-tuning targets from humans or external systems diverge from the model's autoregressive distribution, forcing the optimizer to imitate low-probability token sequences. To address this problem, we propose MixSD, a simple external-teacher-free method for distribution-aligned knowledge injection. Instead of training on fixed targets, MixSD constructs supervision dynamically by mixing tokens from two conditionals of the base model itself: an expert conditional that observes the injected fact in context, and a naive conditional that reflects the model's original prior. The resulting supervision sequences preserve the factual learning signal while remaining substantially closer to the base model's distribution. We evaluate MixSD on two synthetic corpora that we construct to study factual recall and arithmetic function acquisition in a controlled setting, together with established benchmarks for open-domain factual question answering and knowledge editing. Across multiple model scales and settings, MixSD consistently achieves a better memorization-retention trade-off compared to SFT and on-policy self distillation baselines, retaining up to 100% of the base model's held-out capability while maintaining near-perfect training accuracy, whereas standard SFT retains as little as 1%. We further show that MixSD produces substantially lower-NLL supervision targets under the base model and reduces harmful movement along Fisher-sensitive parameter directions. These results suggest that aligning supervision with the model's native generation distribution is a simple and effective principle for knowledge injection that mitigates catastrophic forgetting.

</details>


### [331] [PaliBench: A Multi-Reference Blueprint for Classical Language Translation Benchmarks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16881)
*Máté Metzger,Nadnapang Phophichit*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出PaliBench，一个针对巴利语-英语翻译的多参考基准测试集，并构建了可复用的方法论框架，用于将现有学术翻译转化为评估基础设施，解决古典文本翻译评测中单一参考翻译不足的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前机器翻译基准测试通常只依赖单一参考翻译，而古典文本（如佛经）允许多种忠实但风格、术语各异的译法，现有评测方式无法有效评估此类材料的翻译质量。

Method: 利用LLM辅助对齐独立的不同译者（Sujato、Thanissaro、Bodhi）的英译片段，结合自动验证、段落级质量过滤、去重以及多指标多参考评估流程，构建包含1,700段落、8,389片段、约345K词元的基准测试集。

Result: 使用十个当代大语言模型进行评估，发现系统排名在不同指标间高度一致，但可靠性和语义异常率存在显著差异。

Conclusion: PaliBench提供了将现有学者翻译转化为评估基础设施的通用方法，不将任何单一译本视为权威，可推广至其他拥有足够独立参考译文的古典语料。

Abstract: Digital humanities projects increasingly rely on machine translation and large language models to widen access to classical, religious, and otherwise under-translated textual traditions. Yet standard translation benchmarks are poorly suited to such materials: they typically compare a system output against a single reference translation, even though classical texts often support multiple faithful renderings that differ in terminology, register, and interpretation. This article introduces PaliBench, both a benchmark for Pali-to-English translation and a reusable method for constructing multi-reference translation benchmarks for classical languages. The Pali case study draws on passages from the Sutta Pitaka aligned with independent English translations by Bhikkhu Sujato, Bhikkhu Thanissaro, and Bhikkhu Bodhi. The workflow combines LLM-assisted alignment of independently segmented translations, automated verification against source files, passage-level quality filtering, deduplication of formulaic repetitions, and multi-metric evaluation against multiple human references. The resulting benchmark contains 1,700 passages spanning 8,389 segments and approximately 345,000 tokens. We use it to evaluate ten contemporary large language models with complementary metrics, finding strong cross-metric concordance in system rankings alongside substantial variation in reliability and semantic outlier rates. The broader contribution is methodological: PaliBench shows how existing scholarly translations can be transformed into evaluation infrastructure for interpretive textual traditions without treating any single translation as definitive. Although developed for Pali Buddhist texts, the approach could be portable to other classical corpora where sufficient independent reference translations exist.

</details>


### [332] [E-PMQ: Expert-Guided Post-Merge Quantization with Merged-Weight Anchoring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16882)
*Wenjun Wang,Yanggan Gu,Shuo Cai,Yuanyi Wang,Pengkai Wang,Jianmin Wu,Hongxia Yang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出E-PMQ框架，针对模型合并后的量化问题（PMQ），通过专家引导的层校准和合并权重锚定，有效解耦量化偏差和合并偏差，在多个模型和任务上显著提升低比特部署性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 模型量化和模型合并都是低资源部署的关键技术，但直接将后训练量化（PTQ）应用于合并后的模型不可靠，因为量化偏差和合并偏差耦合在一起，导致性能严重下降。

Method: 提出E-PMQ框架：1）利用源专家权重提供专家引导的输出目标进行层校准；2）采用合并权重锚定稳定校准过程，保持合并模型的集成行为。从而在合并后量化中同时缓解两种偏差。

Result: 在CLIP-ViT-B/32八任务合并上，4-bit GPTQ性能从65.0%提升至73.6%（Task Arithmetic），从69.1%提升至74.8%（TIES-Merging）。20任务CLIP-ViT-L/14上从34.8%提升至76.7%，FLAN-T5-base GLUE上从78.26%提升至83.34%。

Conclusion: E-PMQ框架能够有效实现合并后量化（PMQ），支持低比特部署，为低资源场景下融合多专家模型提供了可靠的量化方案。

Abstract: Low-resource deployment constraints have made model quantization essential for deploying neural networks while preserving performance. Meanwhile, model merging has become an increasingly practical low-resource strategy for integrating multiple task- or domain-specialized experts into a single model without joint training or multi-model serving. Together, quantization and model merging enable an efficient low-resource deployment pipeline by integrating multiple experts into one low-bit model. We formulate this setting as Post-Merge Quantization (PMQ). We show that directly applying post-training quantization (PTQ) to a merged model is unreliable because two distinct deviations are coupled: the quantization deviation introduced by low-bit reconstruction and the expert-relative merging deviation inherited from model merging. To mitigate these deviations, we propose E-PMQ, an expert-guided PMQ framework that uses source expert weights to provide expert- guided output targets during layer-wise calibration, together with merged-weight anchoring to stabilize the calibration and preserve the integrated behavior of the merged model. On CLIP-ViT-B/32 eight-task merging, E-PMQ improves 4-bit GPTQ from 65.0% to 73.6% under Task Arithmetic and from 69.1% to 74.8% under TIES-Merging. On harder settings, E-PMQ improves GPTQ from 34.8% to 76.7% on 20-task CLIP-ViT-L/14 and from 78.26% to 83.34% on FLAN-T5- base GLUE. These results demonstrate that E-PMQ enables effective post-merge quantization and low-bit deployment.

</details>


### [333] [JSPG: Dynamic Dictionary Filtering via Joint Semantic-Pinyin-Glyph Retrieval for Chinese Contextual ASR](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16896)
*Shilin Zhou,Zhenghua Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 针对中文ASR中基座模型产生同音/近音错误导致语义检索失效的问题，提出了联合语义、拼音和字形特征（JSPG）的动态过滤框架，并引入扩展的Smith-Waterman算法计算序列级相似度，实验证明该方法显著优于单特征基线，并提升了下游上下文ASR模型的关键词识别准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 上下文相关ASR面临大规模关键词字典中过多无关候选项引入噪声降低准确率的问题。现有动态过滤方法在中文ASR中失效，因为基座模型产生的同音/近音错误保留了目标关键词的语音线索但严重扭曲语义含义，导致标准语义检索器无效。

Method: 提出JSPG（Joint Semantic, Pinyin, and Glyph）过滤框架：联合语义、拼音和字形三种特征；引入扩展的Smith-Waterman算法计算N-best假设序列与关键词之间的序列级相似度分数，弥合字符级拼音/字形度量与序列级过滤之间的差距。

Result: 在Aishell-1和RWCS-NER数据集上，JSPG显著优于单特征基线；下游上下文ASR模型在JSPG引导下，关键词识别准确率获得大幅提升。

Conclusion: 联合拼音和字形特征可以有效弥补纯语义检索在中文ASR中的不足，扩展的Smith-Waterman算法为序列级过滤提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Contextual Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) faces challenges with large-scale keyword dictionaries, as excessive irrelevant candidates introduce noise that degrades accuracy. To address this, dynamic filtering typically uses a base ASR model to generate preliminary hypotheses, followed by semantic text retrievers to fetch a concise subset of relevant keywords. However, this approach frequently fails in Chinese ASR. Base models often produce homophonic or near-homophonic errors that preserve the phonetic cues of the target keywords but severely distort their semantic meaning, rendering standard semantic retrievers ineffective. To resolve this, we propose a filtering framework that jointly integrates Semantic, Pinyin, and Glyph features (JSPG). Pinyin effectively retrieves targets based on phonetic similarity, while glyph provides complementary structural cues to filter out numerous irrelevant homophones inherent in Chinese. To bridge the gap between character-level pinyin/glyph metrics and sequence-level filtering, we introduce an extended Smith-Waterman algorithm that computes similarity scores between the N-best hypothesis sequences and keywords. Experiments on the Aishell-1 and RWCS-NER datasets demonstrate that JSPG significantly outperforms single-feature baselines. Furthermore, downstream contextual ASR models guided by JSPG achieve substantial improvements in keyword recognition accuracy.

</details>


### [334] [Full Attention Strikes Back: Transferring Full Attention into Sparse within Hundred Training Steps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16928)
*Yanke Zhou,Yiduo Li,Hanlin Tang,Maohua Li,Kan Liu,Lan Tao,Lin Qu,Yuan Yao,Xiaoxing Ma*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: RTPurbo通过识别注意力头中仅少数需要全上下文处理、利用低维索引器高效检索相关token以及动态top-p选择，将全注意力LLM转化为高效稀疏模型，在仅需少量训练步骤下实现近无损精度和高达9.36倍prefill加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长上下文推理中全注意力的二次成本成为瓶颈，现有高效替代方案（原生稀疏训练或启发式token驱逐）在效率、训练成本和准确性之间存在难以取舍的权衡。

Method: 提出RTPurbo方法，基于三个关键观察：(1)仅少数注意力头需要全上下文处理；(2)长程检索主要由低维子空间主导，可用16维索引器高效检索；(3)有效token预算强依赖于查询，动态top-p选择优于固定top-k。仅保留检索头的完整KV缓存，引入轻量token索引器实现稀疏注意力。

Result: 在长上下文基准和推理任务上保持近无损精度，同时在1M上下文场景下实现约9.36倍prefill加速和约2.01倍decode加速。

Conclusion: 标准全注意力训练的LLM已具备内在稀疏性，无需昂贵的原生稀疏预训练即可获得强大的稀疏推理能力。

Abstract: Long-context inference in large language models is bottlenecked by the quadratic cost of full attention. Existing efficient alternatives often rely either on native sparse training or on heuristic token eviction, creating an undesirable trade-off among efficiency, training cost, and accuracy. In this work, we show that full-attention LLMs are already intrinsically sparse and can be transformed into highly sparse models with only minimal adaptation. Our approach is built on three observations: (1) only a small subset of attention heads truly requires full long-context processing; (2) long-range retrieval is governed primarily by a low-dimensional subspace, allowing relevant tokens to be retrieved efficiently with a 16-dimensional indexer; and (3) the useful token budget is strongly query-dependent, making dynamic top-$p$ selection more suitable than fixed top-$k$ sparsification. Based on these insights, we propose RTPurbo, which retains the full KV cache only for retrieval heads and introduces a lightweight token indexer for sparse attention. By exploiting the model's intrinsic sparsity, RTPurbo achieves sparsification with only a few hundred training steps. Experiments on long-context benchmarks and reasoning tasks show that RTPurbo preserves near-lossless accuracy while delivering substantial efficiency gains, including up to a 9.36$\times$ prefill speedup at 1M context and about a 2.01$\times$ decode speedup. These results suggest that strong sparse inference can be obtained from standard full-attention training without expensive native sparse pretraining.

</details>


### [335] [Effort as Ceiling, Not Dial: Reasoning Budget Does Not Modulate Cognitive Cost Alignment Between Humans and Large Reasoning Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16938)
*Yueqing Hu,Tianhong Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 大型推理模型（LRMs）在推理过程中生成的思维链长度与人类反应时间高度对齐，且这种对齐在多种任务和努力水平下保持稳定，不受推理时扰动影响，表明这是一种训练时获得的认知结构，而非在线策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究LRMs生成的思维链长度与人类反应时间之间的对齐是否真正反映了计算结构，还是仅仅源于表面的冗长性。

Method: 使用GPT-OSS-20B和GPT-OSS-120B两种模型，设置三种推理努力水平，在六种推理任务上检验任务内和跨任务的对齐一致性。

Result: 无论任务内还是跨任务，对齐程度几乎不变；努力参数仅设定生成的上限预算，而非驱动实时分配；模型规模提高可改善与人类难度模式的匹配度。

Conclusion: LRMs与人类的认知成本对齐是训练时实现的成果，对推理时扰动具有鲁棒性，支持“编译型”而非“在线型”问题解决机制。

Abstract: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) generate chain-of-thought traces whose length tracks human reaction times across cognitive tasks, but recent debate questions whether this alignment reflects genuine computational structure or surface verbosity. We test whether the alignment varies with inference-time reasoning effort. Across GPT-OSS-20B and GPT-OSS-120B, three effort levels, and six reasoning tasks, within-task and cross-task alignment remain invariant: Bayes Factors lean toward the null, and mean alignment is numerically near-identical across conditions. A manipulation check reveals that the effort parameter sets an upper budget on generation rather than driving real-time allocation, suggesting that the allocation policy is crystallized at training time. Arithmetic complexity contrasts further show that token allocation tracks fine-grained, format-dependent human difficulty patterns, with model scale improving the match. Cognitive cost alignment between LRMs and humans appears to be a training-time achievement, robust to inference-time perturbations, supporting a compiled rather than online account of LRM problem-solving.

</details>


### [336] [Roll Out and Roll Back: Diffusion LLMs are Their Own Efficiency Teachers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16941)
*Fanqin Zeng,Feng Hong,Geng Yu,Huangjie Zheng,Xiaofeng Cao,Ya Zhang,Bo Han,Yanfeng Wang,Jiangchao Yao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出WINO（Wide-In, Narrow-Out）方法，通过可撤销的并行解码解决了扩散大语言模型中质量与速度的权衡问题。WINO先广泛生成多个token，验证后重新掩码不可靠的token；进一步提出WINO+，将验证后的去噪轨迹蒸馏到模型参数中。实验表明，在GSM8K上准确率提升至76.58%且步数减少6.83倍，在Flickr30K上步数减少16.22倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散大语言模型（DLLMs）在加速并行解码时面临严重的质量-速度权衡：揭示多个token会导致质量显著下降。作者将这一困境归因于训练与推理之间的不匹配，即训练从随机损坏状态重建token，而高效推理需要自适应的去噪顺序（先易后难），这一不匹配被不可逆解码放大。

Method: 提出两种互补方法：1）WINO（推理时方法）：实现可撤销的并行解码，先大胆草稿多个token，用全局上下文验证，重新掩码不可靠的token以待后续优化；2）WINO+（训练时扩展）：将WINO验证过的可靠去噪轨迹蒸馏到模型参数中，使训练与高效推理对齐。

Result: 在GSM8K上，WINO将准确率从73.24%提升至75.82%（步数减少6.10倍），WINO+进一步提升至76.58%（步数减少6.83倍）。在Flickr30K上，WINO+实现16.22倍步数减少并提升CIDEr分数。

Conclusion: DLLMs可以充当自身的高效教师：先通过可撤销解码发现可靠去噪顺序，再学习遵循该顺序实现更快的生成。这表明训练-推理对齐是突破扩散LLM效率瓶颈的关键方向。

Abstract: Diffusion Large Language Models (DLLMs) promise fast parallel generation, yet open-source DLLMs still face a severe quality-speed trade-off: accelerating decoding by revealing multiple tokens often causes substantial quality degradation. We attribute this dilemma to a train-inference mismatch amplified by irreversible decoding. While training reconstructs tokens from randomly corrupted states, efficient inference requires an adaptive denoising order, where easier tokens are revealed earlier and context-dependent ones are deferred. This view motivates two complementary methods: an inference-time method that makes parallel decoding revokable, and a training-time extension that distills the reliable order exposed by this revokable process. Accordingly, we first propose Wide-In, Narrow-Out (WINO), a training-free decoding algorithm that enables revokable parallel generation. WINO aggressively drafts multiple tokens, verifies generated tokens with enriched global context, and re-masks unreliable ones for later refinement. Building on this discovered order, we further introduce WINO+, which injects the verified denoising trajectories produced by WINO into model parameters, aligning training with efficient inference. Experiments on LLaDA and MMaDA show that WINO improves both quality and efficiency, while WINO+ further strengthens this progression. On GSM8K, WINO improves accuracy from 73.24% to 75.82% with a 6.10x step reduction, and WINO+ further achieves 76.58% with a 6.83x reduction. On Flickr30K, WINO+ reaches a 16.22x step reduction with improved CIDEr. These results demonstrate that DLLMs can serve as their own efficiency teachers by first discovering reliable denoising orders through revokable decoding and then learning to follow them for faster generation. Code is available at https://github.com/Feng-Hong/WINO-DLLM/tree/WINO-plus.

</details>


### [337] [Closing the Gap at CRAC 2026: Two-Stage Adaptation for LLM-Based Multilingual Coreference Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16984)
*Antoine Bourgois,Olga Seminck,Thierry Poibeau*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文介绍了在 CRAC 2026 共享任务 LLM 赛道中取得第一名的系统，该系统基于 Gemma-3-27b 模型，采用两阶段微调策略（多语言基础适配器 + 数据集特定适配器）、基于中心词的 XML 格式提及表示以及迭代标注方法，在官方测试集上取得了 74.32 的平均 CoNLL F1 分数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 参与 CRAC 2026 共享任务，探索如何利用大语言模型（LLM）有效解决指代消解任务，并验证所提出设计策略在跨语言、长文档和不同标注规范下的泛化能力。

Method: 基于 Gemma-3-27b 模型进行微调；采用两阶段训练策略：第一阶段训练多语言基础适配器，第二阶段训练数据集特定适配器；使用 XML 风格的格式，以中心词（headword）表示提及跨度，并采用局部重新索引；对文档进行迭代标注。

Result: 在官方测试集上取得平均 CoNLL F1 分数 74.32，在 LLM 赛道排名第一，在所有赛道中总体排名第三。

Conclusion: 所提出的设计选择（中心词表示、XML 格式、两阶段微调等）在多语言、长文档和不同标注规范场景下均表现出良好的有效性，验证了该方法的鲁棒性和通用性。

Abstract: We present our submission to the LLM track of the 2026 Computational Models of Reference, Anaphora and Coreference (CRAC 2026) shared task. With an average CoNLL F1 score of 74.32 on the official test set, our system ranked first in the LLM track, and third overall. Our system is based on the Gemma-3-27b model, fine-tuned using a two-stage strategy with a multilingual base adapter followed by dataset-specific adapters. We represent mention spans by their headword using an XML-inspired format with local reindexing and annotate documents iteratively. These design choices proved effective across languages, document lengths, and annotation guidelines.

</details>


### [338] [Skills on the Fly: Test-Time Adaptive Skill Synthesis for LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16986)
*Jingxing Wang,Chenyu Zhou,Zhihui Fu,Jun Wang,Weiwen Liu,Weinan Zhang,Jianghao Lin*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SkillTTA是一种测试时自适应技能合成方法，通过检索少量与当前任务相关的训练轨迹，合成临时任务特定文本技能，在不更新模型参数的情况下实现上下文自适应，在多个基准测试中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM智能体受益于可复用技能，但测试时任务往往需要比静态技能库更具体的指导，现有方法无法在测试时动态适应当前任务需求。

Method: SkillTTA检索与当前任务相关的小量训练轨迹，将其合成为临时的任务特定文本技能，求解模型保持固定，所有自适应通过生成的上下文实现而非参数更新。

Result: 在SpreadsheetBench上Pass@1从0.397提升至0.505，BigCodeBench上Pass@1从0.517提升至0.651；ALFWorld上匹配更强的记忆学习基线（成功率差4点以内），且生成最短成功轨迹。

Conclusion: 合成的任务特定技能优于原始轨迹提示；top-k检索应保持小规模；失败轨迹因暴露评估者常犯错误而特别有用。

Abstract: LLM agents benefit from reusable skills, yet test-time tasks often require guidance more specific than a static skill library can provide. We propose \emph{SkillTTA}, a Test-Time Adaptive Skill Synthesis method that retrieves a small set of training trajectories relevant to the current task and synthesizes them into a temporary, task-specific textual skill. The solver model is kept fixed, so adaptation happens entirely through generated context rather than parameter updates. We evaluate the method on SpreadsheetBench, ALFWorld, and BigCodeBench. Compared with static trajectory-to-skill synthesis using GPT-5.5, task-specific skills improve SpreadsheetBench Pass@1 from 0.397 to 0.505 and BigCodeBench Pass@1 from 0.517 to 0.651. On ALFWorld, the method matches a heavier memory-learning baseline within four points of success rate while producing the shortest successful trajectories among reported methods. Ablations on SpreadsheetBench further show that synthesized skills outperform raw trajectory prompting, that top-$k$ retrieval should stay small, and that failed trajectories are especially useful because they expose recurring evaluator-facing mistakes.

</details>


### [339] [Response-free item difficulty modelling for multiple-choice items with fine-tuned transformers: Component-wise representation and multi-task learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16991)
*Jan Netík,Patrícia Martinková*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出基于Transformer的端到端联合编码方法，无需人工特征工程即可建模阅读理解选择题难度。通过微调Transformer编码器直接处理题目文本，并提出了组件变体和多任务变体两种扩展。在蒙特卡洛子采样设计下评估发现：联合编码是可行的端到端替代方案；多任务变体在小样本场景下有显著提升；组件变体无明显优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统阅读理解选择题的难度建模依赖学生作答数据的响应校准，而免响应建模虽理想但困难重重，因为难度取决于跨文字成分的推理需求。现有方法需要手动提取题目文本特征（丢失信息），且依赖独立的统计或机器学习模型，缺乏端到端学习能力。

Method: 1）端到端微调Transformer编码器直接处理题目文本（联合编码）；2）组件变体：通过共享编码器分别编码不同文字成分；3）多任务变体：保留联合编码，同时增加辅助的机器阅读理解多选题目标。采用蒙特卡洛子采样设计，在三种训练集规模下评估。

Result: 联合编码是有效的端到端替代方案；组件变体未见显著优势（自注意力机制已能捕获跨成分信号）；多任务变体在小样本场景下有显著成对提升；Transformer微调在应用测量典型训练集规模下能恢复大量可推导的信号。

Conclusion: Transformer微调结合合适的辅助任务（多任务学习）可在小样本下有效建模题目难度，框架具有可扩展性，为心理测量学驱动的扩展提供了可定制的接口。

Abstract: Response-free item difficulty modelling promises to reduce reliance on response-based calibration but is intrinsically difficult on reading-comprehension multiple-choice items, where difficulty depends on inferential demands across wording components. Whereas most existing approaches extract item-text features and pass them to a separate statistical or machine-learning model, we fine-tune transformer encoders end-to-end on the item wording, eliminating the manual feature engineering and preprocessing that discards information. Moreover, two extensions to this joint-encoding approach are proposed: a component-wise variant that encodes wording components separately through a shared encoder, and a multi-task variant that retains joint encoding and adds an auxiliary multiple-choice question answering objective on the shared encoder. Each method is evaluated under a Monte Carlo subsampling design at three training-set sizes on a held-out test set. We find that joint encoding is a viable end-to-end alternative to feature-engineering pipelines; while the component-wise variant shows no detectable benefit, consistent with self-attention already harvesting the cross-component signal, the multi-task variant delivers significant paired improvements in the smallest-sample regime. Transformer fine-tuning, especially if regularised by a suitable auxiliary task, recovers a substantial share of the wording-derivable signal at training-set sizes typical of applied measurement. The framework provides a customisable interface for psychometrically motivated extensions.

</details>


### [340] [Evaluation Drift in LLM Personality Induction: Are We Moving the Goalpost?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16996)
*Prateek Rajput,Yewei Song,Iyiola E. Olatunji,Jacques Klein,Tegawendé F. Bissyandé*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文通过微调LLM使其具备大五人格，发现微调能稳定问卷得分但无法准确诱导出完整人格轮廓，主张使用场景引导的数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究LLM是否能稳定表达类人性格，还是仅模仿表面线索而无稳定内在人格特征。

Method: 在长篇essay上微调LLM（SFT、DPO、ORPO），关联目标大五人格，并用IPIP-NEO问卷评估人格的稳定性与忠实度。

Result: 微调降低了问卷方差（提升稳定性），但完整五维人格准确率近乎随机，单维度分数虽有改善。

Conclusion: 未经引导的essay缺乏足够线索支撑忠实人格表达，需要场景化数据集或交互式累积证据的方法。

Abstract: Can large language models reliably express a human-like personality, or are they merely mimicking surface cues without a stable underlying profile? To investigate this, we induce personality in LLMs by fine-tuning them on the long-form essays, where each essay is associated with a target Big Five personality profile. We then evaluate the stability and fidelity of the induced personality using the IPIP-NEO questionnaire. Specifically, we ask: (i) does post-training (SFT, DPO, ORPO) stabilize questionnaire scores under prompt rephrasings, and (ii) can it induce target Big Five profiles from unguided essays? Our results demonstrate that fine-tuning consistently reduces variance in questionnaire responses across five models, directly mitigating the evaluation fragility reported in pre-trained models. However, this newfound stability reveals a more fundamental limitation: accuracy on the full five-dimensional profile remains near chance, even when single-trait scores improve. This indicates that unguided essays lack the cues needed for faithful personality expression. We therefore argue for scenario-grounded datasets or interactive elicitation that accumulates test-aligned evidence over time.

</details>


### [341] [HalluScore: Large Language Model Hallucination Question Answering Benchmark](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17007)
*Aisha Alansari,Hamzah Luqman*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出HalluScore，一个阿拉伯语问答基准数据集，用于评估大语言模型在阿拉伯语场景下的幻觉行为，涵盖不同推理难度、知识领域、历史时间线和阿拉伯文化场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有幻觉评测基准主要集中在英文和中文，阿拉伯语因标注资源稀缺和语言形态复杂性而缺乏相关评测基准，无法充分反映阿拉伯语的语音、文化和推理特性。

Method: 构建结构化流水线，包含质量保证、清晰性和事实有效性过滤、模型驱动选择等步骤，最终筛选出827个高质量问题；每个问题配备已验证的真实证据、答案解释和多标签标注。

Result: 对17个阿拉伯语、多语言和推理LLM进行了全面实证分析，并提供了人工标注的高质量幻觉结果。发现阿拉伯语LLM的幻觉不仅限于事实错误，还包括文化理解、语言推理和逻辑一致性问题。

Conclusion: HalluScore填补了阿拉伯语幻觉评测的空白，有助于提升LLM在阿拉伯语场景下的可靠性和文化能力。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in natural language generation, but remain susceptible to hallucination. In response to growing concerns about hallucinations, several benchmarks have been developed, primarily in English and Chinese. However, Arabic remains underrepresented, with limited benchmarks for LLMs hallucination due to scarce annotated resources and the language's morphological complexity. Consequently, existing benchmarks do not adequately reflect the linguistic, cultural, and reasoning characteristics of Arabic. To address this gap, we introduce HalluScore, a structured Arabic question answering benchmark designed to evaluate hallucination behavior in LLMs across different levels of reasoning difficulty, various knowledge domains, historical timelines, and culturally grounded Arabic scenarios. It contains 827 carefully curated questions for evaluating, detecting, and mitigating hallucination in LLMs. The dataset was constructed through a structured pipeline involving quality assurance, filtering for clarity and factual validity, and model-driven selection to retain questions that consistently trigger hallucinations. Each question is linked to verified ground-truth evidence, answer explanations, and multi-label annotations. Using the HalluScore benchmark, we conduct a comprehensive empirical analysis of hallucination patterns across 17 Arabic, multilingual, and reasoning LLMs. Moreover, we provide high-quality human annotations identifying hallucinated, non-hallucinated, and partially hallucinated responses of all evaluated LLMs. These results suggest that hallucination in Arabic LLMs extends beyond factual inaccuracies, encompassing challenges related to cultural understanding, linguistic reasoning, and logical consistency. We release HalluScore to support future research on improving the reliability and cultural competence of LLMs in Arabic.

</details>


### [342] [PARALLAX: Separating Genuine Hallucination Detection from Benchmark Construction Artifacts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17028)
*Khizar Hussain,Murat Kantarcioglu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文揭示幻觉检测领域的显著进步很大程度上源于基准构建中的伪影（四分之六的数据集将正确答案直接嵌入输入提示），而非方法真正有效。通过大规模评估（22种检测方法、12个开源模型、6个数据集），发现排除伪影后大多数方法表现接近随机，仅SAPLMA和DRIFT两个监督探针方法表现一致。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM幻觉在医疗、法律、科学等领域造成直接危害，从模型内部状态检测幻觉被视为安全部署的关键路径。然而先前研究报道的检测性能可能被基准数据集的构造缺陷所夸大，需要重新审视。

Method: 1) 揭示六个数据集中四个存在将正确答案直接嵌入输入提示的构造伪影；2) 引入文本相似度基线TxTemb证明该伪影可被利用实现近乎完美检测；3) 开展大规模对照评估（22种方法、12个模型、6个数据集）；4) 提出DRIFT——一种基于层间隐藏状态转换的监督探针方法。

Result: 大多数现有方法在控制伪影后表现接近随机猜测水平；仅SAPLMA和DRIFT（两者均为上层隐藏状态的监督探针）在受控条件下保持一致性表现。

Conclusion: 该领域的幻觉检测进展很大程度上被基准构建伪影所解释，需要更加严格的基准设计和评估标准来推动真正有效的检测方法发展。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) hallucinate with confidence: their outputs can be fluent, authoritative, and simply wrong. In medical, legal, and scientific applications this failure causes direct harm, and detecting it from internal model states offers a path to safer deployment. A growing body of work reports that this problem is increasingly tractable, with recent methods achieving high detection performance on widely used benchmarks. We show, however, that much of this apparent progress does not survive scrutiny. Four of the six corpora embed the ground-truth answer directly in the input prompt. A naïve text-similarity baseline we call \textsc{TxTemb} exploits this to achieve near-perfect detection scores without any access to model internals. To measure what genuine detection capability remains once these artifacts are controlled, we conduct a large-scale evaluation spanning twenty-two detection methods, twelve open-source models spanning six architectural families, and six corpora. We further introduce \textbf{DRIFT}, a supervised probe over inter-layer hidden-state transitions, as a point of comparison for live-generation detection. Our findings suggest that the field's reported progress on hallucination detection is substantially explained by benchmark construction artifacts in widely used corpora, and that the majority of established baselines perform near chance under controlled conditions; the consistent exceptions are SAPLMA and DRIFT, both supervised probes on upper-layer hidden states.

</details>


### [343] [Agentic AI Translate: An Agentic Translator Prototype for Translation as Communication Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17041)
*Masaru Yamada*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了一个名为Agentic AI Translate的智能体翻译系统原型，将翻译研究的元语言转化为生成式AI的指令代码，用四阶段智能体循环（识别→提示→生成→验证）替代传统的文本输入/输出范式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战机器翻译中主流的文本输入/输出范式，论证在生成式AI时代，翻译本质上是沟通设计（communication design）而非文本转换（text conversion），需要将翻译研究中的理论概念（如目的论、语域、受众、体裁）转化为可操作的AI指令。

Method: 四阶段智能体循环：（1）交互式规范阶段——用户通过模型辅助对话构建结构化翻译简报；（2）Identify（识别）；（3）Prompt（提示）；（4）Generate（生成）；（5）Verify（验证）——采用GEMBA-MQM错误跨度协议进行基于证据的评分，并通过DelTA-lite记忆机制（专有名词记忆+运行中双语摘要）维护文档级连贯性。

Result: 论文提供的是概念性和架构性的贡献——一个可执行的立场体现，实证验证留给未来工作。

Conclusion: 翻译在生成式AI时代应是沟通设计而非文本转换，该架构通过将翻译研究理论（目的论、语域、受众、体裁）编码为AI指令，实现了这一哲学立场的技术具身化。

Abstract: We present Agentic AI Translate, an agentic translator prototype that operationalises the thesis of Yamada (forthcoming) -- that the metalanguage of Translation Studies has become an instruction code for generative AI. The system replaces the dominant text-in / text-out paradigm of machine translation with a four-stage agentic cycle (Identify -> Prompt -> Generate -> Verify), preceded by an interactive specification phase in which the user composes -- through model-assisted dialogue -- a structured translation brief grounded in skopos theory, register, audience, and genre conventions. The verification stage adopts the GEMBA-MQM error-span protocol (Kocmi & Federmann, 2023) for evidence-grounded scoring, and document-level coherence is preserved through a DelTA-lite memory of proper nouns and a running bilingual summary, after Wang et al. (2025). We describe the philosophical motivation, the architectural commitments, the four reference-material categories the system consumes, and the principal design tensions the architecture makes explicit. Empirical validation is left for future work; the contribution here is conceptual and architectural -- an executable embodiment of the position that translation in the GenAI era is communication design, not text conversion.

</details>


### [344] [Can LLMs Think Like Consumers? Benchmarking Crowd-Level Reaction Reconstruction with ConsumerSimBench](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17079)
*Tianyu Wang,Jiajun Li,Jianghao Lin*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: ConsumerSimBench是一个基于1553个真实中文社交媒体话题和23122个可审计反应标准构建的基准，用于评估LLM模拟消费者反应的能力。结果显示最强模型Gemini-3.1-Pro仅覆盖47.8%的真实反应标准，暴露出技术基准与社会消费直觉之间的巨大鸿沟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评估很少检验LLM能否重建真实消费者在公共话语中表现出的具体反应模式，缺乏对模型消费者模拟能力的系统评估。

Method: 从1553个真实中文社交媒体话题提取23122个原子级、可审计的二元判断标准（涵盖四类反应），用三点式判断取代整体偏好评分，将消费者模拟重构为对真实公共话语反应的预测问题。

Result: 三点式判断将评委一致性从65.8%提升至92.1%，点式判断与人类多数标签一致率达98.4%。Gemini-3.1-Pro最好但仅覆盖47.8%；直接结构化推理提示降低覆盖率，而生成-反思多智能体流水线将MiMo-V2.5-Pro从32.9%提升至37.6%。

Conclusion: 前沿LLM在预测高语境中文消费者话语中真正关心的反应方面仍远不可靠，技术基准表现与社会性消费直觉之间存在显著差距。

Abstract: LLMs are increasingly used as ``digital consumers'' to simulate public opinion, pre-test marketing decisions, and anticipate audience response. However, existing evaluations rarely ask whether a model can reconstruct the concrete reaction patterns that real consumers surface in public discourse. We introduce ConsumerSimBench, a benchmark built from 1,553 real Chinese social-media topics and 23,122 atomic, rule-audited criteria spanning four reaction families. Rather than scoring open-ended generations with a holistic preference judge, ConsumerSimBench decomposes each task into auditable yes-no decisions over concrete reaction points, raising three-judge agreement from 65.8% to 92.1% with 98.4% agreement between pointwise judge decisions and human-majority labels. Across 13 frontier generators, the strongest model, Gemini-3.1-Pro, covers only 47.8% of real reaction criteria, while GPT-5.2 and Claude-4.6 trail far behind despite their strength on technical benchmarks. The failures reveal a sharp gap between technical-benchmark performance and socially grounded consumer intuition. A direct structured reasoning prompt decreases coverage, while a generate--reflect multi-agent pipeline improves MiMo-V2.5-Pro from 32.9% to 37.6% on a subset. ConsumerSimBench reframes consumer simulation as a forecasting problem over real public-discourse reactions, showing that frontier LLMs remain far from reliably predicting what consumers will actually care about in high-context Chinese consumer discourse.

</details>


### [345] [ACIL: Auto Chain of Thoughts for In-Context Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17088)
*Rui Chu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Auto-CoT框架，通过自动为示例生成推理链并筛选高质量样本，增强上下文学习中的多步推理能力，提升大语言模型在复杂推理任务上的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准上下文学习在需要多步推理的任务中表现不佳，因为演示样本通常只包含输入-输出对，缺乏显式的中间推理步骤。

Method: Auto-CoT框架：自动为输入-输出示例生成推理链，用结构化的中间解释增强提示上下文，并通过系统化的选择过程移除无关或低质量的演示样本。

Result: 在多个推理任务上的实验表明，该框架通过提供显式的中间推理指导，提升了上下文学习的性能。

Conclusion: Auto-CoT通过自动构建推理增强型演示样本，有效改善了标准ICL在多步推理任务上的不足。

Abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have shown that Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning can substantially improve performance on complex reasoning tasks. At the same time, In-Context Learning (ICL) has become an important mechanism for adapting LLMs to new tasks without updating model parameters, using only examples provided in the prompt. However, standard ICL often struggles on tasks that require multi-step reasoning, because the demonstrations usually contain only input-output pairs and lack explicit intermediate reasoning steps. This paper introduces an Automatic Chain-of-Thought (Auto-CoT) framework to improve ICL by automatically constructing reasoning-enhanced demonstrations. Auto-CoT generates reasoning chains for input-output examples, augments the prompt context with structured intermediate explanations, and removes irrelevant or low-quality demonstrations through a systematic selection process. By incorporating high-quality reasoning examples into the ICL prompt, Auto-CoT guides the model toward more reliable reasoning and improves prediction accuracy. Experiments across multiple reasoning tasks demonstrate that the proposed framework improves ICL performance by providing explicit intermediate reasoning guidance.

</details>


### [346] [SEMA-RAG: A Self-Evolving Multi-Agent Retrieval-Augmented Generation Framework for Medical Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17101)
*Yongfeng Huang,Ruiying Chen,James Cheng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SEMA-RAG通过多智能体解耦检索、解释和裁决任务，将单轮静态RAG重构为动态多轮探索，在医学问答上平均提升+6.46%准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RAG在医学问答中采用单轮静态检索范式，与临床推理的多阶段过程不匹配，导致两个结构性缺陷：问题到查询的翻译缺乏临床语义解释，检索缺乏迭代充分性反馈，难以形成可靠证据链。根本原因在于单条推理链过载了解释、探索和裁决三类异质任务。

Method: 提出SEMA-RAG，通过任务解耦和动态多轮探索重构工作流，引入三个专业智能体：Interpreter Agent（临床模式解释）、Explorer Agent（充分性驱动的自进化检索）、Arbiter Agent（证据裁决与答案选择）。

Result: 在5个基准和5个LLM骨干上，SEMA-RAG平均超过最强基线+6.46个准确率百分点（按骨干模型计量）。

Conclusion: 任务解耦与多智能体协作能有效解决RAG在医学问答中的结构性缺陷，多轮动态探索比单轮静态检索更符合临床推理本质。

Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is widely employed to mitigate risks such as hallucinations and knowledge obsolescence in medical question answering, yet its predominantly single-round, static retrieval paradigm misaligns with the multi-stage process of clinical reasoning. This compressed workflow induces two structural deficiencies: question-to-query translation often lacks clinically grounded semantic interpretation, and retrieval lacks iterative sufficiency feedback, making it difficult to form reliable evidence chains. We argue that both issues stem from a deeper cause: overloading a single reasoning chain with heterogeneous tasks of interpretation, exploration, and adjudication. The remedy is to reconstruct the workflow via task decoupling and dynamic multi-round exploration. To this end, we propose SEMA-RAG, a Self-Evolving Multi-Agent RAG framework for medical question answering, which assigns these roles to three specialist agents: the Interpreter Agent for clinical schema interpretation, the Explorer Agent for sufficiency-driven self-evolving retrieval, and the Arbiter Agent for evidence adjudication and answer selection. Across five benchmarks and five LLM backbones, SEMA-RAG improves the strongest baseline by +6.46 accuracy points on average, measured per backbone.

</details>


### [347] [HyDRA: Hybrid Dynamic Routing Architecture for Heterogeneous LLM Pools](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17106)
*Aashna Garg,Siddharth Singha Roy,Jinu Jang,Federico Brancasi,Shengyu Fu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: HyDRA是一个面向生产级LLM部署的混合动态路由框架。它通过ModernBERT编码器预测查询在推理、代码生成、调试和工具使用四个维度的能力需求，再通过短额匹配算法从异构模型池中选择最经济的模型。该框架与模型目录完全解耦，添加或移除模型只需配置变更而无需重训练。在SWE-Bench Verified上，HyDRA在峰值质量模式下（75.4%）超过最强基线Claude Sonnet 4.6（74.2%），同时节省12.9%成本；在同等质量模式下节省54.1%成本（相比此前二进制路由器的9.1%提升6倍）；激进模式下节省72.5%成本。该框架已部署至GitHub Copilot的VS Code Chat自动模式，并首次展示了跨CJK、欧洲及其他语系的语言不变路由能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM路由方法存在两个主要问题：(1) 做出二元的"强vs弱"粗粒度决策，无法精细匹配查询需求与模型能力；(2) 学习参数与具体模型身份强耦合，当模型池变更时必须重新训练。这无法适应生产环境中异构模型池频繁更新的需求。

Method: HyDRA由两个核心组件构成：(1) 能力预测器——使用ModernBERT编码器配合K=4个独立sigmoid头，对每个查询在推理、代码生成、调试和工具使用四个维度进行细粒度能力需求评分；(2) 短额匹配算法——根据配置定义的模型能力画像，选择满足预测需求的最廉价模型。该框架支持可调的短额阈值，可灵活在质量和成本之间权衡。

Result: 在5模型池上，HyDRA在SWE-Bench Verified中三种模式下表现优异：峰值质量模式（75.4%）超越Claude Sonnet 4.6基线（74.2%）且节省12.9%成本；等质量模式节省54.1%成本（此前二进制路由器仅9.1%）；激进模式节省72.5%成本（质量下降3.2点）。预测器在CPU上推理延迟仅86ms（中位数）。结果在LiveCodeBench、BigCodeBench和tau-bench上均保持一致性。

Conclusion: HyDRA证明了细粒度、多维度、与模型身份解耦的路由框架在生产环境中的有效性。它不仅在质量和成本之间实现了灵活可调的最优平衡，还首次展示了语言不变路由能力，可泛化至CJK、欧洲及其他语系。该框架已实际部署至GitHub Copilot的VS Code Chat自动模式。

Abstract: Production LLM deployments increasingly maintain heterogeneous model pools spanning order-of-magnitude cost differences. Existing routers make binary strong-vs-weak decisions and couple learned parameters to specific model identities, requiring retraining whenever the catalog changes. We present HyDRA (Hybrid Dynamic Routing Architecture), a framework that predicts fine-grained, multi-dimensional capability requirements per query and matches them against configuration-defined model profiles via shortfall matching. A ModernBERT encoder with K=4 independent sigmoid heads scores each query along reasoning, code generation, debugging, and tool use; a shortfall-matching algorithm then selects the cheapest model whose capabilities meet the predicted requirements. The deployed predictor runs at 86 ms median CPU inference latency in production, and is fully decoupled from the model catalog -- adding or removing models requires only a configuration change, with zero retraining. On SWE-Bench Verified (5-model pool: GPT-5.4-mini, Claude Haiku 4.5, GPT-5.3 Codex, Claude Sonnet 4.6, GPT-5.4), HyDRA's tunable shortfall threshold spans three regimes: peak-quality exceeds the always-strong Claude Sonnet 4.6 baseline (75.4% vs. 74.2% resolution) at 12.9% cost savings; iso-quality matches Sonnet at 54.1% cost savings, a 6x improvement over our prior in-house binary router at 9.1%; aggressive pushes savings to 72.5% for a 3.2-point quality trade. Results generalize across LiveCodeBench, BigCodeBench, and tau-bench. HyDRA is deployed to all users in GitHub Copilot's VS Code Chat auto-mode and -- to our knowledge for the first time in the LLM routing literature -- demonstrates language-invariant routing across CJK, European, and other script families.

</details>


### [348] [The Point of No Return: Counterfactual Localization of Deceptive Commitment in Language-Model Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17113)
*Scott Merrill,Shashank Srivastava*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出反事实定位方法，通过重采样推理轨迹前缀来检测语言模型何时开始欺骗，构建了包含~1.46M句子、94.1M重采样延续和91.5B生成token的大型语料库，发现注意力过渡特征比词汇线索更具跨环境泛化能力，并识别出可跨环境因果抑制欺骗承诺的紧凑注意力头集合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有欺骗数据集将欺骗视为最终响应的属性，忽略了一个更根本的问题：语言模型在推理过程中何时开始承诺欺骗？

Method: 提出反事实定位方法：对推理轨迹的每个句子前缀固定并重采样延续，估计欺骗结果的概率；构建五个欺骗从策略激励中自然涌现的环境（战略虚张声势、迷宫引导、财务建议、二手车销售、议价谈判），无需人为提示或主观标注。

Result: 词汇线索的跨环境迁移效果差，而基于注意力的过渡特征能泛化到分布外环境；识别出不到10%的紧凑注意力头集合，在一个环境上选择后可在保留环境上因果抑制欺骗承诺。

Conclusion: 欺骗承诺反映在可复用的推理动态变化而非表面形式中；发布该语料库作为研究语言模型推理中欺骗及更广泛承诺行为的基础资源。

Abstract: Existing deception datasets label completed outputs as honest or deceptive, treating deception as a property of the final response rather than a function of the model's reasoning trace. This obscures a more fundamental question: when does a language model become committed to deception? We introduce counterfactual localization: for each sentence prefix in a reasoning trace, we fix the prefix, resample continuations, and estimate the probability of a deceptive outcome. To scale this, we construct five environments (spanning strategic bluffing, maze guidance, financial advice, used-car sales, and offer negotiation) in which deception is never prompted but emerges from strategic incentives and labels follow mechanically from environment state rather than subjective human judgment. The resulting corpus localizes $\sim$1.46M sentences across four reasoning models, drawn from over 94.1M sampled continuations, 91.5B generated tokens, and over 100K scenarios. Sentence-level human evaluation confirms that detected commitment points correspond to interpretable shifts in decision state. Using this resource, we show that lexical cues for commitment prediction transfer poorly across environments, whereas attention-based transition features generalize out of distribution, suggesting that deceptive commitment is reflected in reusable changes in reasoning dynamics rather than surface form. We further identify compact attention-head sets (under 10% of heads) that, selected on one environment, causally suppress deceptive commitment across held-out environments. We release the corpus as a substrate for studying deception, and more broadly commitment, in language-model reasoning.

</details>


### [349] [Multilingual and Multimodal LLMs in the Wild: Building for Low-Resource Languages](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17152)
*Firoj Alam,Shammur Absar Chowdhury,Enamul Hoque Prince*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本教程聚焦多语言多模态LLM（文本、语音、视觉三模态），在低资源/低算力条件下实现跨语言多模态对齐，提供低成本数据构建、适配器堆叠、文化感知评估及实践资源（如PALO、Maya模型和语音-文本-LLM流水线）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前多模态LLM正从视觉-语言转向三模态（看、听、读），但现有流程和基准高度英语中心化且计算开销大，缺乏面向低资源语言场景的系统性教程。

Method: 综合已有基础与前沿成果（PALO、Maya等），涵盖：低成本数据创建与 curation；三模态对齐适配器堆叠；文化感知评估；提供微调紧凑多语言VLM及搭建语音→文本→LLM流水线的实操资源。

Result: 形成一套交互式半日教程，面向低资源语言场景的多语言多模态AI研究人员与从业者。

Conclusion: 该教程弥补了多语言多模态LLM领域缺乏低资源、低算力导向系统性教学的空缺，具有较高的实用价值。

Abstract: Multimodal LLMs are evolving from vision-language to tri-modality that see, hear, and read, yet pipelines and benchmarks remain English-centric and compute-heavy. The tutorial offers an overview of this emerging research area for multilingual multimodality across text, speech, and vision under limited data/compute budgets, synthesizing foundations, recent multilingual models (PALO, Maya), speech-text LLMs. We cover low-cost data creation/curation; adapter stacks for tri-modal alignment; culture-aware evaluation beyond English and hands on resources for fine-tuning a compact multilingual VLM and wiring a speech->text->LLM pipeline. The content will be delivered as an interactive half-day tutorial, designed for researchers and practitioners working on multilingual, multimodal AI in low-resource language settings.

</details>


### [350] [Why Do Safety Guardrails Degrade Across Languages?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17173)
*Max Zhang,Ameen Patel,Sang T. Truong,Sanmi Koyejo*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出多组项目反应理论（IRT）框架，将跨语言安全评估中的多个因素（安全鲁棒性、提示固有难度、语言处理难度、跨语言安全差距）解耦，通过1.9M数据量分析61个模型在10种语言上的表现，发现安全机制主要是一维的、低资源语言不一定会导致更差安全（英语反而更脆弱）、物理伤害类提示跨语言安全差距大，IRT框架在预测安全拒绝时AUC达0.940，优于简单基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有跨语言安全评估依赖Jailbreak Success Rate (JSR)这一聚合指标，将多种安全驱动因素混为一谈，无法揭示安全失败的具体原因，需要更细粒度的解耦分析方法。

Method: 提出Multi-Group Item Response Theory (IRT)潜变量模型，解耦语言无关的安全鲁棒性(θ)、提示固有难度(β)、全局语言处理难度(γ)、提示特定跨语言安全差距(τ)四个因素；使用MultiJail数据集（190万行数据，61个模型配置，5个闭源模型家族，10种语言），并辅以探索性因子分析、翻译质量评估、母语者验证等多维度分析。

Result: 安全机制主要是一维的；22个模型在英语中比低资源语言更脆弱；低资源语言产生熵值更高的不确定响应；高τ提示聚集在物理伤害类别（如盗窃、武器）和低资源语言；翻译质量整体与τ相关性低，但严重误译导致高偏差异常值；文化概念基底不匹配也贡献了τ；IRT框架预测安全拒绝AUC=0.940，优于基线。

Conclusion: IRT框架能揭示聚合指标掩盖的概念-语言漏洞，实现更公平的跨语言安全评估，指导针对性的数据集构建和改进。

Abstract: Large language models exhibit safety degradation in non-English languages. Standard evaluation relies on Jailbreak Success Rate (JSR), which confounds several safety-driving factors into one, obscuring the specific cause(s) of safety failure. We introduce a latent variable model, a Multi-Group Item Response Theory (IRT) framework, that decouples safety-driving factors such as language-agnostic safety robustness ($θ$), intrinsic prompt hardness ($β$), global language processing difficulty ($γ$), and a prompt-specific cross-lingual safety gap ($τ$). Using the MultiJail dataset, we evaluate the safety robustness of 61 model configurations across 5 closed-model families and 10 languages of varying resource, aggregating a dataset of 1.9 million rows. Exploratory Factor Analysis shows safety is primarily unidimensional: models refuse different harm types mainly through a shared mechanism. Contrary to the expected trend that safety degrades largely in low-resource languages, 22 model configurations are more vulnerable in English than in low-resource languages. Low-resource languages produce more uncertain responses (high entropy) than high-resource languages. Also, high-$τ$ prompts cluster in physical harm categories like Theft and Weapons and lower-resource languages, trends validated through cross-dataset generalization. While global translation quality shows low correlation with $τ$, severe mistranslations drive high-bias outliers, as validated by native speakers. Cultural and conceptual grounding mismatches also contribute to $τ$. In predictive validation, the IRT framework achieves $\mathrm{AUC} = 0.940$, outperforming simpler baselines in predicting safe refusal of unsafe prompts. Our framework reveals concept-language vulnerabilities that aggregate metrics obscure, enabling fairer cross-lingual safety evaluation and targeted improvements in dataset construction.

</details>


### [351] [PluRule: A Benchmark for Moderating Pluralistic Communities on Social Media](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17187)
*Zoher Kachwala,Bao Tran Truong,Rasika Muralidharan,Haewoon Kwak,Jisun An,Filippo Menczer*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出PluRule基准，用于检测多元社区中的规则违规行为。研究发现，即使最先进的视觉-语言模型（如GPT-5.2）在此任务上也表现不佳，仅略优于随机基线。更大的模型和更多上下文带来的提升有限，而文明和自我推广等通用规则更容易检测。结果表明，多元社区的社交媒体验证对语言模型是一个根本性挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 社交媒体正转向多元主义——社区自治平台，不同群体定义自己的规范。在一个社区违规的内容在另一个社区可能完全可接受。现有的AI审核模型难以适应这种规则多样化场景，因此需要研究AI能否帮助管理这样的多元社区。

Method: 将任务形式化为多项选择问题，模拟人类审核员的操作方式：给定评论及其上下文，识别违反了哪条具体规则（如果有）。构建了PluRule基准，包含13,371条规则违规检测，覆盖1,989个Reddit社区、2,885条规则、9种语言，是多模态多语言的基准数据集。

Result: 最先进的视觉-语言模型（GPT-5.2）在PluRule上仅略优于平凡基线。更大的模型规模和增加上下文信息带来的性能提升有限。通用规则（如文明规范、自我推广）更容易被检测到。

Conclusion: 多元社区的审核对语言模型而言是一个根本性挑战，现有AI模型在此任务上能力不足，需要进一步研究。

Abstract: Social media are shifting towards pluralism -- community-governed platforms where groups define their own norms. What violates rules in one community may be perfectly acceptable in another. Can AI models help moderate such pluralistic communities? We formalize the task as a multiple-choice problem, mirroring how human moderators operate in the real world: given a comment and its surrounding context, identify which specific rule, if any, is violated. We introduce PluRule, a multimodal, multilingual benchmark for detecting 13,371 rule violations across 1,989 Reddit communities spanning 2,885 rules in 9 languages. Using this benchmark, we show that state-of-the-art vision-language models struggle significantly: even GPT-5.2 with high reasoning performs only slightly better than a trivial baseline. We also find that bigger models and increased context provide marginal gains, and universal rules like civility and self-promotion are easier to detect. Our results show that moderation of pluralistic communities on social media is a fundamental challenge for language models. Our code and benchmark are publicly available.

</details>


### [352] [LLMs for automatic annotation of Mandarin narrative transcripts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17205)
*Qingwen Zhao,Hongao Zhu,Yunqi He,Rui Wang,Aijun Huang,Hai Hu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究评估了LLMs在中文叙事宏观结构标注中的表现，发现最佳模型与人类标注者的一致性接近人类间信度（k=.794 vs .872），标注时间减少65%，但在需要细微语义区分的类别和词汇变化较大的年轻成人叙事中表现较差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 言语转录的语言标注对语言习得、语言障碍和社会语言学研究至关重要，但目前仍依赖大量人力，耗时费力。虽然LLMs在自动化标注任务中展现了潜力，但其处理非英语语言的复杂话语级标注能力尚不明确。

Method: 以多语言叙事评估工具（MAIN）为测试平台，评估四个LLMs对中文口语叙事宏观结构（故事语法元素的层级组织）的标注能力，并与经过训练的人类标注者进行比较。数据涵盖儿童、年轻成人和老年人三个年龄段。

Result: 最佳模型与人类标注者的一致性接近人类间信度（k=.794 vs .872），标注时间减少65%；轻量级本地部署模型表现明显较差。不同宏观结构元素的标注难度存在系统性差异，需要细微语义区分的类别仍具挑战。模型在年轻成人叙事上可靠性下降，这类数据词汇变化更大、语义更模糊、单句多元素整合更常见。

Conclusion: LLMs能有效支持非英语口语语料的话语级标注，但在语义复杂的任务中仍需人工监督。提示模板已开源。

Abstract: Linguistic annotation of transcribed speech is essential for research in language acquisition, language disorders, and sociolinguistics, yet remains labor-intensive and time-consuming. While Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promise in automating annotation tasks, their ability to handle complex discourse-level annotation in non-English languages remains understudied. This study evaluates whether LLMs can reliably annotate narrative macrostructure-the hierarchical organization of story grammar elements-in spoken Mandarin, using the Multilingual Assessment Instrument for Narratives (MAIN) as a testbed. We compared four LLMs against trained human annotators on narratives produced by children, young adults, and older adults. The best-performing model achieved agreement with human raters (k=.794) approaching human-human reliability levels (k=.872) while reducing annotation time by 65%, whereas the locally deployable lightweight model performed substantially worse. Annotation difficulty varied systematically by macrostructure element type, with categories requiring subtle semantic differentiation posing persistent challenges. Furthermore, model reliability decreased on young adult narratives, which exhibited greater lexical variation, semantic ambiguity, and multi-element integration within single utterances. These findings suggest that LLMs can effectively support discourse-level annotation in non-English spoken corpora, while highlighting the continued need for human oversight in semantically complex tasks. Our prompt templates are open sourced for future use.

</details>


### [353] [Artificial Intolerance: Stigmatizing Language in Clinical Documentation Skews Large Language Model Decision-Making](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17228)
*Jen-tse Huang,Didi Zhou,Faith Kamau,Amy Oh,Anne R. Links,Mark Dredze,Mary Catherine Beach,Somnath Saha*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文发现前沿LLM在临床文本处理中会继承并放大污名化语言偏见，导致临床决策偏向保守，且现有缓解策略（如思维链推理、自我去偏）效果有限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM正被部署到临床决策支持等高风险领域，但模型面对临床笔记中常见的污名化语言时是否表现出偏见尚未被充分研究。

Method: 系统性评估9个前沿LLM，针对4种被污名化的医疗条件，注入不同程度和类型的污名化语言（怀疑、责备、诽谤），并测试提示词缓解策略（CoT推理、自我去偏）。

Result: 所有模型均表现出显著偏见，临床决策偏向更保守的患者管理；单个污名化语句即可改变模型输出，呈现剂量-反应关系；CoT和自我去偏策略效果有限，模型难以明确识别污名化语言但隐性受其影响。

Conclusion: 当前LLM在临床NLP中存在严重的公平性和鲁棒性漏洞，需要严格的算法防护措施以防止自动化健康差异。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in high-stakes domains such as clinical decision support and medical documentation. However, the robustness of these models against subtle linguistic variations, specifically stigmatizing language (SL) commonly found in human-authored clinical notes, remains critically under-explored. In this work, we investigate whether frontier LLMs inherit and propagate this human bias when processing clinical text. We systematically evaluate nine frontier LLMs across four stigmatized medical conditions, utilizing clinical vignettes injected with varying intensities and phenotypes of SL (doubt, blame, and maligning). Our results demonstrate that all evaluated models exhibit substantial bias, with clinical decision-making significantly skewed towards less aggressive patient management. Notably, we observe a high sensitivity to linguistic framing, where a single SL sentence is sufficient to alter model outputs, revealing a clear dose-response relationship. Furthermore, we evaluate standard prompt-based mitigation strategies, including Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning and model self-debiasing. These approaches show limited efficacy; models struggle to explicitly identify SL while remaining implicitly influenced by it. Our findings expose a critical vulnerability in current LLMs regarding fairness and robustness in clinical NLP, underscoring the need for rigorous algorithmic guardrails to prevent the automation of health disparities.

</details>


### [354] [OProver: A Unified Framework for Agentic Formal Theorem Proving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17283)
*David Ma,Kaijing Ma,Shawn Guo,Yunfeng Shi,Enduo Zhao,Jiajun Shi,Zhaoxiang Zhang,Gavin Cheung,Jiaheng Liu,Zili Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: OProver是一个面向Lean 4的智能体形式化定理证明统一框架，通过反复利用编译器验证的证明和编译器反馈迭代修复失败的证明尝试。模型通过持续预训练和迭代后训练（结合智能体证明、SFT和RL）完成训练，构建了包含177万条Lean语句和686万个编译器验证证明的OProofs数据集。在五个基准测试中，OProver-32B在MiniF2F（93.3%）、ProverBench（58.2%）和PutnamBench（11.3%）上取得最佳Pass@32成绩。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有形式化定理证明的进展主要依赖大规模证明生成和验证器感知训练，但智能体式证明（agentic proving）很少被集成到证明器训练中，仅出现在推理阶段。作者旨在将智能体式证明纳入训练过程，实现统一框架。

Method: OProver采用统一框架：持续预训练后迭代后训练，每轮迭代包括运行智能体证明、将新验证的证明索引到OProofs和检索记忆、使用修复轨迹进行SFT训练、使用未解决的难题进行强化学习。构建的OProofs数据集包含177万条Lean语句和686万个编译器验证的证明。

Result: 在五个基准测试中，OProver-32B在MiniF2F达到93.3%、ProverBench达到58.2%、PutnamBench达到11.3%的Pass@32最佳成绩；在MathOlympiad（22.8%）和ProofNet（33.2%）上排名第二，整体领先于同类开源权重证明器。

Conclusion: 将智能体式证明集成到模型训练过程中显著提升了形式化定理证明的性能，OProver在多个基准测试中达到领先水平，证明了迭代训练框架的有效性。

Abstract: Recent progress in formal theorem proving has benefited from large-scale proof generation and verifier-aware training, but agentic proving is rarely integrated into prover training, appearing only at inference time. We present OProver, a unified framework for agentic formal theorem proving in Lean 4, in which failed proof attempts are iteratively revised using retrieved compiler verified proofs and Lean compiler feedback. OProver is trained through continued pretraining followed by iterative post-training: each iteration runs agentic proving, indexes newly verified proofs into OProofs and the retrieval memory, uses repair trajectories as SFT data, and uses unresolved hard cases for RL. OProofs is built from public Lean resources, large-scale proof synthesis, and agentic proving traces, containing 1.77M Lean statements, 6.86M compiler-verified proofs, and serialized trajectories with retrieved context, failed attempts, feedback, and repairs. Across five benchmarks, OProver-32B attains the best Pass@32 on MiniF2F (93.3%), ProverBench (58.2%), and PutnamBench (11.3%), and ranks second on MathOlympiad (22.8%) and ProofNet (33.2%) more top placements than any prior open-weight whole-proof prover.

</details>


### [355] [ConflictRAG: Detecting and Resolving Knowledge Conflicts in Retrieval Augmented Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17301)
*Chenyu Wang,Yingmin Liu,Yang Shu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: ConflictRAG是一个冲突感知的RAG框架，能够检测、分类和解决检索文档间的知识冲突，通过三项核心贡献（两阶段冲突检测、熵-TOPSIS可信度评估、CARS诊断评分）在三个基准测试中实现88.7%的冲突检测F1值和5.3-6.1%的正确率提升，并减少62%的API成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RAG系统隐含假设检索文档相互一致，但这一假设在实践中频繁失效，导致生成结果不可靠。亟需一个能够主动处理文档间知识冲突的框架。

Method: 1) 两阶段冲突检测：轻量级嵌入MLP分类器+选择性LLM精炼，降低62%API成本；2) 熵-TOPSIS数据驱动来源可信评估，比人工启发式提升7.1%；3) 冲突感知RAG评分(CARS)用于诊断评估。

Result: 88.7%冲突检测F1，比最强基线提升5.3-6.1%正确率，API成本降低62%，检测精度90.8%，跨骨干LLM迁移有效。

Conclusion: ConflictRAG有效解决了RAG系统中的知识冲突问题，兼顾效率与准确性，且具有良好的模型泛化能力。

Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems implicitly assume mutual consistency among retrieved documents -- an assumption that frequently fails in practice. We present ConflictRAG, a conflict-aware RAG framework that detects, classifies, and resolves knowledge conflicts prior to answer generation. The framework introduces three contributions: (1) a two-stage conflict detection module combining a lightweight embedding-based MLP classifier with selective LLM refinement, reducing API costs by 62% while maintaining 90.8% detection accuracy; (2) an Entropy-TOPSIS framework for data-driven source credibility assessment, improving selection accuracy by 7.1% over manual heuristics; and (3) a Conflict-Aware RAG Score (CARS) for diagnostic evaluation of conflict-handling capabilities. Experiments on three benchmarks against six baselines demonstrate 88.7% conflict-detection F1 and consistent 5.3--6.1% correctness gains over the strongest conflict-aware baseline, with the pipeline transferring effectively across backbone LLMs.

</details>


### [356] [Weak-to-Strong Elicitation via Mismatched Wrong Drafts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17314)
*Wei Deng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 通过将较小领域模型产生的错误推导注入强学习者的GRPO训练上下文（错配错误变体），在MATH-500和AIME 2025/2026上显著优于标准在线策略GRPO，且无需SFT、奖励模型或合成数据，在Mathstral-7B上达到71.98%的MATH-500最高记录。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究离策略经验（来自更小更弱模型）能否激发强学习者在在线策略RL微调（如GRPO）无法达到的能力，即利用"错配"作为主动成分提升性能。

Method: 使用Mathstral-7B作为学习者，Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B作为草稿模型，在8.8K MATH问题上进行Dr. GRPO训练。关键是将草稿模型的错误推导注入到与问题不匹配的上下文中（错配错误变体），并与匹配错误、匹配正确、无草稿等变体对比。

Result: 错配错误变体在MATH-500上greedy pass@1领先其他所有变体1.62pp；在AIME 2025/2026上，从k=1到1024全面超越基线，pass@1024分别领先+14.2pp和+9.0pp。在Mathstral-7B-v0.1上达到71.98% MATH-500，为已知最高记录。

Conclusion: 错配错误推导注入是一种简单、高效且无需额外资源的强学习能力激发方法，其效果优于匹配错误、匹配正确和无草稿变体，且跨分布泛化能力强。

Abstract: We consider whether off-policy experience from a smaller, weaker model can elicit capability in a stronger learner that on-policy RL fine-tuning (e.g., GRPO) does not reach. We find that injecting mathematically wrong drafts from a smaller but more domain-trained model -- mismatched to the current problem -- into a stronger learner's GRPO context consistently outperforms standard on-policy GRPO on held-out MATH-500 and out-of-distribution AIME 2025/2026. Concretely, we use Mathstral-7B as the learner, Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B as the draft model, 8.8K Level 3--5 MATH problems (with MATH-500 held out), and train with Dr. GRPO. Mismatch is an active ingredient: shuffling drafts to mismatched problems while holding everything else constant yields $+1.62$pp on MATH-500 (greedy pass@1) over the matched-wrong variant ($n=10$ seeds, $p=0.0015$, Welch's $t$). In fact, the mismatched-wrong variant leads all other variants we tested on MATH-500 across both greedy pass@1 and sampling pass@$k$. On out-of-distribution AIME 2025 and 2026, the mismatched-wrong variant uniquely lifts pass@$k$ above both Mathstral-7B (in its native [INST] format) and the Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B draft model at every sample budget from $k=1$ to $k=1024$ across 2 seeds ($+14.2$pp on 2025 and $+9.0$pp on 2026 at pass@1024 over Mathstral-7B), and at pass@1024 also leads no-draft, matched-wrong, and mismatched-correct variants on both years. All variants use the same prompt with no draft injection at test time. The recipe -- trained on a single GPU with no SFT, no reward models, no synthesized data, and no produce-critique-revise inner loop -- reaches 71.98% MATH-500 on Mathstral-7B-v0.1, the highest published result on this model to our knowledge, surpassing the heavier WizardMath pipeline at 70.9% on full MATH (SFT + PPO with process/instruction reward models).

</details>


### [357] [Transitivity Meets Cyclicity: Explicit Preference Decomposition for Dynamic Large Language Model Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17342)
*Yucong Huang,Xiucheng Li,Kaiqi Zhao,Jing Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出混合奖励-循环（HRC）模型和动态自对弈偏好优化（DSPPO）框架，将偏好分解为正交的传递（标量）与循环（向量）成分，通过博弈论方法引导策略收敛至纳什均衡，实验证明其在混合传递-循环偏好场景下优于传统RLHF和GPM方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准RLHF基于可传递的标量奖励，无法捕捉人类偏好中的循环特性（如A>B, B>C, C>A）。已有方法GPM虽尝试解决，但其隐式公式将层次性与循环性纠缠在一起，无法保证得到占优解。

Method: 提出HRC模型，利用博弈论分解将偏好显式解耦为正交的传递（标量）和循环（向量）分量。同时提出DSPPO，将对齐建模为时变博弈，逐步引导策略向纳什均衡进化。

Result: 在合成数据上，HRC收敛更快、精度更高；在RewardBench 2上，HRC超越BT和GPM基线（如Gemma-2B-it上+1.23%），尤其在Ties领域表现突出；在AlpacaEval 2.0、Arena-Hard、MT-Bench上，HRC+DSPPO显著优于SPPO基线（AlpacaEval 2.0上长度控制胜率达44.75%）。

Conclusion: HRC模型通过显式分离偏好中的传递性与循环性，结合DSPPO动态优化，能更有效地处理复杂、非严格的偏好关系，在多项基准上取得显著提升。

Abstract: Standard RLHF relies on transitive scalar rewards, failing to capture the cyclic nature of human preferences. While some approaches like the General Preference Model (GPM) address this, we identify a theoretical limitation: their implicit formulation entangles hierarchy with cyclicity, failing to guarantee dominant solutions. To address this, we propose the Hybrid Reward-Cyclic (HRC) model, which utilizes game-theoretic decomposition to explicitly disentangle preferences into orthogonal transitive (scalar) and cyclic (vector) components. Complementing this, we introduce Dynamic Self-Play Preference Optimization (DSPPO), which treats alignment as a time-varying game to progressively guide the policy toward the Nash equilibrium. Synthetic data experiments further validate HRC's structural superiority in mixed transitive--cyclic settings, where HRC converges faster and achieves higher accuracy than GPM. Experiments on RewardBench 2 demonstrate that HRC consistently improves over both BT and GPM baselines (e.g., +1.23% on Gemma-2B-it). In particular, its superior performance in the Ties domain empirically validates the model's robustness in handling complex, non-strict preferences. Extensive downstream evaluations on AlpacaEval 2.0, Arena-Hard-v0.1, and MT-Bench confirm the efficacy of our framework. Notably, when using Gemma-2B-it as the base preference model, HRC+DSPPO achieves a peak length-controlled win-rate of 44.75% on AlpacaEval 2.0 and 46.8% on Arena-Hard-v0.1, significantly outperforming SPPO baselines trained with BT or GPM. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/lab-klc/Hybrid-Reward-Cyclic.

</details>


### [358] [PROTEA: Offline Evaluation and Iterative Refinement for Multi-Agent LLM Workflows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18032)
*Kazuki Kawamura,Satoshi Waki,Kei Tateno*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: PROTEA是一个统一接口，用于离线、测试驱动的多智能体LLM工作流改进——通过评分中间节点输出、反向节点评估和可编辑提示修订来定位瓶颈，在两项生产级任务中分别将准确率从64.3%提升至83.9%，Hit@5从0.30提升至0.38。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体LLM工作流虽优于单提示基线，但调试和优化困难——中间输出的细微错误会向下游传播，开发者需检查长追踪日志推断哪个智能体需要修改。

Method: PROTEA包含三个核心组件：(1) 正向执行与评分，用可配置评分标准对中间节点输出打分；(2) 反向节点评估，从最终答案参考答案和图上下文生成候选节点期望并与实际输出对比；(3) 可编辑提示修订，提供前后对比、自动重跑并展示得分轨迹。

Result: 在文档检查任务中准确率从64.3%提升至83.9%；在推荐任务中Hit@5从0.30提升至0.38。六名经验丰富的LLM开发者肯定了图级定位、节点解释和可编辑提示修订功能。

Conclusion: PROTEA通过图级可视化定位、反向评估和迭代提示编辑，有效降低了多智能体LLM工作流的调试难度，显著提升了性能，受到开发者好评。

Abstract: Multi-agent LLM workflows -- systems composed of multiple role-specific LLM calls -- often outperform single-prompt baselines, but they remain difficult to debug and refine. Failures can originate from subtle errors in intermediate outputs that propagate to downstream nodes, requiring developers to inspect long traces and infer which agent to modify. We present PROTEA, a unified interface for offline, test-driven improvement of multi-agent workflows. PROTEA executes a workflow, scores intermediate node outputs with configurable rubrics, and overlays per-node states and rationales on the workflow graph to localize likely bottlenecks. To support complex systems where final-answer references are the primary supervision, PROTEA performs backward node evaluation: it generates candidate node-level expectations from final-answer references and graph context, then compares them with observed node outputs. For selected nodes, PROTEA presents targeted prompt revisions as editable before/after comparisons, then automatically reruns and re-evaluates the workflow to show output changes and score trajectories within the same interface. In two production-adjacent workflows, PROTEA improved document-inspection accuracy from 64.3% to 83.9% and recommendation Hit@5 from 0.30 to 0.38. In a formative study with six experienced LLM developers, participants valued graph-level localization, per-node rationales, and editable before/after prompt revisions.

</details>


### [359] [Taming "Zombie'' Agents: A Markov State-Aware Framework for Resilient Multi-Agent Evolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17348)
*Taolin Zhang,Pukun Zhao,Qizhou Chen,Jiuheng Wan,Chen Chen,Xiaofeng He,Chengyu Wang,Richang Hong*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出AgentRevive框架，通过Markov状态感知的软状态转换（Active/Standby/Terminated）实现多智能体系统的弹性演化，避免激进剪枝导致有价值智能体被过早丢弃的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的多智能体系统常采用激进的图演化策略（如节点或边剪枝），这容易因幻觉或临时知识空白等短暂问题过早丢弃有价值的智能体，忽略了这些"僵尸"智能体后续恢复并贡献的可能性。

Method: 提出AgentRevive框架，包括：(1)状态感知策略学习——将智能体状态分为Active、Standby、Terminated三类，通过风险估计器评估幻觉风险来优化状态转换；(2)状态感知边优化——根据策略学习到的状态剪枝子图边，永久移除Terminated节点，保留Standby节点以供后续轮次评估其潜在贡献。

Result: 在通用推理、领域特定和幻觉挑战任务上的大量实验表明，该方法持续优于强基线，并通过状态感知的智能体调度显著减少了token消耗。

Conclusion: AgentRevive通过软状态转换机制有效解决了多智能体系统中过早剪枝的问题，在保持性能的同时大幅提升了token效率。

Abstract: Recent advancements in LLM-based multi-agent systems have demonstrated remarkable collaborative capabilities across complex tasks. To improve overall efficiency, existing methods often rely on aggressive graph evolution among agents (e.g., node or edge pruning), which risks prematurely discarding valuable agents due to transient issues such as hallucinations or temporary knowledge gaps. However, such hard pruning overlooks the potential for ``zombie'' agents to recover and contribute in subsequent discussion rounds. In this paper, we propose AgentRevive, a Markov state-aware framework for resilient multi-agent evolution. Our approach dynamically manages agent collaboration through soft state transitions, implemented via two key components: (1) State-Aware Policy Learning: Agent states are divided into ``Active'', ``Standby'', and ``Terminated'' states, selectively propagating messages based on agent memory. The policy employs a risk estimator to optimize agent state transitions by assessing hallucination risk, minimizing the influence of unreliable nodes while safeguarding valuable ones. (2) State-Aware Edge Optimization: Subgraph edges are pruned according to states learned from the policy, permanently removing ``Terminated'' nodes and retaining ``Standby'' nodes for subsequent rounds to assess their potential future contributions. Extensive experiments on general reasoning, domain-specific, and hallucination challenge tasks show that our method consistently outperforms strong baselines and significantly reduces token consumption through state-aware agent scheduling.

</details>


### [360] [AMATA: Adaptive Multi-Agent Trajectory Alignment for Knowledge-Intensive Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17352)
*Taolin Zhang,Dongyang Li,Chen Chen,Qizhou Chen,Jiuheng Wan,Xiaofeng He,Chengyu Wang,Richang Hong*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: AMATA提出了一种自适应多智能体轨迹对齐框架，通过六个专用智能体协作并结合外部知识，采用轨迹偏好对齐方法（包括智能体内部偏好学习和智能体间依赖学习），在五个知识密集型问答基准上优于基线方法，同时减少了token消耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在知识密集型问答中存在事实不一致、幻觉以及长尾知识差距等问题，现有方法难以有效整合外部知识来提升回答的事实准确性。

Method: 提出AMATA框架：1）六个专用智能体协作进行复杂问题推理；2）将多智能体与外部工具的协作形式化为轨迹偏好对齐问题；3）引入智能体内轨迹偏好学习（优先关键智能体）和智能体间依赖学习（通过依赖感知的直接偏好优化捕获跨智能体工具依赖）。

Result: 在五个知识密集型QA基准上，AMATA一致优于基线方法、知识增强框架和基于LLM的轨迹系统，同时有效减少了token消耗。

Conclusion: AMATA通过多智能体轨迹对齐有效提升了LLM在知识密集型问答中的事实一致性和可解释性，为多智能体协作推理提供了一种新范式。

Abstract: Despite substantial advances in large language models (LLMs), generating factually consistent responses for knowledge-intensive question answering remains challenging. These difficulties are primarily due to hallucinations and the limitations of LLMs in bridging long-tail knowledge gaps. To address this, we propose AMATA, an Adaptive Multi-Agent Trajectory Alignment framework that dynamically integrates external knowledge to improve response interpretability and factual grounding. Our architecture leverages six specialized agents that collaboratively perform structured actions for complex question reasoning. We formalize multi-agent collaboration with external tools as a trajectory preference alignment problem, incorporating question-aware agent customization and inter-agent preference harmonization. AMATA introduces two principal innovations: (1) Intra-Trajectory Preference Learning, which learns objective-oriented preferences to prioritize critical agents, and (2) Inter-Agent Dependency Learning, which captures cross-agent tool dependencies through a novel dependency-aware direct preference optimization technique. Empirical results show that AMATA consistently outperforms baseline approaches, knowledge-augmented frameworks, and LLM-based trajectory systems on five established knowledge-intensive QA benchmarks. Further analysis demonstrates the efficiency of our method in reducing token consumption.
