Method: 构建了一个包含临床医生验证的伦理困境基准数据集，并设计了能从决策中恢复价值优先级的归因方法，用于审计前沿大语言模型在医疗伦理决策中的价值多元性。

Result: 前沿模型在群体层面覆盖了医生级别的价值异质性；模型在推理中能讨论竞争性价值观（奥弗顿多元性），但单个模型的决策近乎确定，无法复现医生群体的分布多元性；大多数模型的价值优先级在医生变异范围内，但有些显著低估了患者自主权。

Conclusion: 没有明确努力来平衡伦理观点，单一LLM的部署将放大其自身价值优先级，有可能以"部署单一文化"取代临床多元性。

Abstract: Medicine is inherently pluralistic. Principles such as autonomy, beneficence, nonmaleficence, and justice routinely conflict, and such ethical dilemmas often sharply divide reasonable physicians. Good clinical practice navigates these tensions in concert with each patient's values rather than imposing a single ethical stance. The ethical values that large language models bring to medical advice, however, have not been systematically examined. We present a framework for auditing value pluralism in medical AI, comprising a benchmark of clinician-verified dilemmas and an attribution method that recovers value priorities directly from decisions. The ecosystem of frontier models spans physician-level value heterogeneity, and models discuss competing values in their reasoning (Overton pluralism) before committing to a decision. However, individual model decisions are near-deterministic across repeated sampling and semantic variations, failing to reproduce the distributional pluralism of the physician panel. Across benchmark cases, these consistent decisions reflect committed, systematic value preferences. While most model priorities fall within the natural range of inter-physician variation, some significantly underweight patient autonomy. A single LLM deployed without regard for its value priorities could amplify those priorities at scale to every patient it serves. Without explicit efforts to balance ethical perspectives with one or multiple models, these tools risk replacing clinical pluralism with a deployment monoculture.

</details>


### [615] [Actionable World Representation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18743)
*Kunqi Xu,Jitao Li,Jianglong Ye,Tianshu Tang,Isabella Liu,Sifei Liu,Xueyan Zou*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出WorldString，一种可直接从点云或RGB-D视频学习物体状态流形的神经架构，作为物理世界模型的基础构件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法要么通过视频生成，要么通过动态场景重建来处理物体动作状态，但都没有以统一、有原则的方式显式建模"物体"这一基本元素来构建可操作的物体表征。

Method: 提出WorldString神经架构，直接从点云或RGB-D视频流中学习真实世界物体的状态流形，构建全可微分的数字孪生结构。

Result: 该架构实现了物体状态流形的建模，且全可微分结构便于与策略学习和神经动力学集成。

Conclusion: WorldString作为物理世界模型的基础构建模块，为后续与强化学习策略和动力学建模的融合提供了可行性。

Abstract: Inspired by the emergent behaviors in large language models that generalized human intelligence, the research community is pursuing similar emergent capabilities within world models, with a emphasis on modeling the physical world. Within the scope of physical world model, objects are the fundamental primitives that constitute physical reality. From humans to computers, nearly everything we interact with is an object. These objects are rarely static; they are actionable entities with varying states determined by their intrinsic properties. While current methods approach object action states either via video generation or dynamic scene reconstruction, none explicitly model this basic element in a unified, principled way to build an actionable object representation. We propose WorldString, a neural architecture capable of modeling the state manifold of real-world objects by learning directly from point clouds or RGB-D video streams. Serving as a versatile digital twin, it acts as a foundational building block for physical world models; thus, we name it WorldString. Sweetly, its fully differentiable structure seamlessly enables future integration with policy learning and neural dynamics.

</details>


<div id='cs.NI'></div>

# cs.NI [[Back]](#toc)

### [616] [End-to-End Simulation of 5G NR Integrated Access and Backhaul Networks for Remote Maritime Connectivity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16531)
*Alessandro Traspadini,Matteo Pagin,Raphaël Ihamouine,Rupert Lucas,Andrew Noren,Michele Zorzi,Marco Giordani*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文综述了3GPP Release 16-18中IAB网络的最新规范，并提出了一个基于ns-3的IAB模块，包含完整的端到端协议栈。通过在自定义海事场景中进行系统级仿真，评估了毫米波IAB网络在近海环境中的不同拓扑和信道条件下的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 毫米波5G网络面临严重的路径损耗和阻塞问题，这限制了其覆盖范围。因此需要灵活的无線回传解决方案（如IAB）来将连接扩展到小区边界和未铺设光纤的区域，包括海事环境。

Method: 概述了3GPP Release 16-18的IAB规范，开发了ns-3 IAB模块（包含BAP层、灵活时隙与控制配置、时分/频分复用方案），并在自定义海事场景中进行了系统级仿真。

Result: 通过在不同拓扑和信道条件下对配备IAB节点的船只进行仿真，验证了所提IAB模块的有效性，提供了毫米波IAB网络在近海环境中设计和部署的见解。

Conclusion: IAB是应对毫米波覆盖挑战的有效无线回传方案，所开发的ns-3模块可支持动态多跳网络，对近海环境中的5G网络部署具有重要参考价值。

Abstract: Millimeter wave (mmWave) 5th generation (5G) networks offer high data rates but face coverage challenges due to severe path loss and blockage. These problems motivate the use of Integrated Access and Backhaul (IAB) as a flexible wireless backhaul solution that extends connectivity to cell boundaries and unfibered areas, including maritime environments. This paper overviews the latest 3GPP specifications for IAB networks in Releases 16 through 18. Then, it presents an ns-3 module for IAB, featuring a complete end-to-end protocol stack, including the backhaul adaptation protocol (BAP) layer, flexible slot and control configurations, and multiplexing schemes based on both time and frequency division. We test the IAB module via extensive system-level simulations in a custom maritime scenario where vessels, equipped with IAB-nodes, can simultaneously act as access points and relays, forming dynamic multi-hop networks that maintain connectivity via wireless backhaul to shore-based stations. We evaluate different topologies and channel conditions, providing insights into the design and deployment of mmWave IAB networks in offshore environments.

</details>


### [617] [Re/Imagining Smart Home Automation Framework in the Era of 6G-Enabled Smart Cities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16599)
*Byungkwan Jung,Suman Kumar,Adityasinh Manthansinh Chauhan*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 提出一个基于6G网络和6G云计算的智能家居自动化框架，通过增强安全、数据预处理、大数据智能和云安全服务虚拟化，应对智能家居在实时数据处理、安全等方面的挑战，并以灾害安全路由为案例验证其效用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能家居自动化系统面临实时更新、高效数据管理、实时大数据处理、安全措施和高级分析等挑战，亟需一个更强大的框架来应对这些问题。

Method: 提出利用6G网络和6G云计算的框架，包含增强安全、数据预处理、大数据智能和云安全服务虚拟化四个核心组件。

Result: 通过多种应用场景和灾害安全路由案例研究，验证了该框架的实用性，并展示了6G网络和6G云的关键作用。

Conclusion: 6G网络和6G云计算的结合能有效解决智能家居自动化中的关键挑战，对智慧城市发展具有重要意义。

Abstract: Smart home automation systems represent a seamless integration of Internet of Things technologies, facilitating the monitoring, management, and regulation of various aspects of our daily life. By leveraging advancements in communication, computing, sensing, and actuator technologies, they hold promises for enhancing the living experience. However, they face challenges such as the need for timely updates, efficient data management, real-time Big data processing, robust security measures, and advanced analytics. In this paper, we propose a novel framework that capitalizes on the capabilities of 6G networks and 6G-enabled cloud computing to address these challenges and improve the overall landscape of smart cities. This framework features enhanced security, data pre-processing, big data intelligence, and security service virtualization in the cloud. Through various application scenarios and a case study-focusing on safe routing during disasters, we demonstrate the utility of this framework and the critical role 6G networks and 6G-enabled cloud computing play in smart home automation.

</details>


### [618] [Transformer-Based MCS Prediction for 5G Multicast-Broadcast Services (MBS)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16735)
*Kasidis Arunruangsirilert,Jiro Katto*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 针对5G MBS广播中RLC-UM模式因无反馈导致丢包永久性损害QoE的问题，提出轻量级Transformer框架，利用0.5ms粒度的商业网络数据集和自定义非对称安全损失函数，预测28个MCS索引的成功概率，优先保障链路稳定性而非吞吐量，在实现86.89%可靠性的同时推理时间低于0.07ms。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 5G MBS广播服务中，RLC-UM模式缺乏反馈重传机制，丢包不可恢复且直接影响用户体验，而传统为单播设计的链路自适应算法倾向于激进地最大化吞吐量，无法适应这种高风险场景，导致视频卡顿和缓冲问题。

Method: 提出轻量级Transformer框架，预测28个MCS索引在即将到来的视频片段时间段内的成功概率；利用0.5ms时隙粒度的独特商用网络数据集，采用自定义非对称安全损失函数（Asymmetric Safety Loss）训练模型，对信道高估施加更大惩罚以优先保证链路稳定性。

Result: 该方法在可靠性评分上达到86.89%，显著优于以原始吞吐量为优化目标的AI基线（31.65%）；在商用5G智能手机上推理时间小于0.07ms，满足实时应用需求。

Conclusion: 所提出的轻量级Transformer方案能够有效提升5G MBS广播的链路可靠性，避免视频中断，同时具备保守的安全偏差和极低的推理延迟，适合实际部署。

Abstract: The deployment of 5G Multicast-Broadcast Services (MBS) is emerging as a critical technology for spectral-efficient UHD content delivery and serving as a promising solution to modernize CATV deployment. However, unlike unicast networks that rely on RLC-AM with HARQ retransmissions, MBS broadcast operates in RLC Unacknowledged Mode (RLC-UM), where the absence of a feedback loop means packet loss is permanent and immediately impacts user QoE. Conventional link adaptation algorithms, designed for unicast, typically aggressively maximize throughput and fail in this risk-intolerant environment, resulting in severe video stalls and rebuffering. To address this, we propose a lightweight Transformer-based framework that predicts the success probability of all 28 MCS indices over an upcoming video segment horizon. Utilizing a unique commercial network dataset with 0.5 ms slot-level granularity, we train our model using a custom Asymmetric Safety Loss function that penalizes channel overestimation to prioritize link stability. Experimental results show that our approach achieves a reliability score of 86.89%, significantly outperforming standard AI baselines optimized for raw throughput (31.65%) while maintaining a safe conservative bias. Furthermore, the model is optimized for real-time applications, demonstrating an inference time of less than 0.07 ms on COTS 5G-era smartphones.

</details>


### [619] [SpaceMoE: Towards Orbital General Intelligence with Distributed Mixture-of-Experts Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16849)
*Qian Chen,Xianhao Chen,Min Sheng,Kaibin Huang*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出SpaceMoE范式，探讨在资源受限的卫星网络上利用混合专家（MoE）架构实现分布式大语言模型推理，重点解决专家放置、选择及状态传输三大设计问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 卫星网络需要支持多样化服务和通用人工智能（AGI），但LLM部署受限于星载内存、计算和能源的严格约束，亟需高效推理方案。

Method: 基于MoE架构的稀疏专家激活机制，提出SpaceMoE分布式推理范式，并系统分析专家放置、专家选择、隐状态传输与路由三个核心设计问题，融入卫星动态拓扑、电池退化、热约束等特有因素。

Result: 展示了MoE架构在卫星网络中的可行性与优势，识别了卫星特有约束对传统解决方案的根本性重塑作用。

Conclusion: SpaceMoE为未来卫星网络中实现可扩展、高效、可持续的星上MoE推理提供了新方向，并指出了若干有前景的研究课题。

Abstract: As satellite networks evolve to support increasingly diverse services and artificial general intelligence (AGI), large language models (LLMs) are emerging as a critical foundation for future space systems. However, deploying LLMs on satellites is hindered by stringent constraints on onboard memory, computation, and energy. In this context, the mixture-of-experts (MoE) architecture emerges as a promising solution, leveraging sparse expert activation to enable scalable model inference. By harnessing the architectural advantages of MoE, this article provides a comprehensive overview of SpaceMoE, a new paradigm for distributed MoE inference in satellite networks. We first review recent industrial progress and emerging standardization trends that motivate the evolution toward space AGI systems. Then, we introduce the fundamentals and architectural evolution of SpaceMoE. Subsequently, we discuss three fundamental design problems in SpaceMoE, namely expert placement, expert selection, and hidden-state transmission and routing, highlighting how satellite-specific factors such as dynamic topology, battery degradation, and thermal limits fundamentally reshape their solutions. Finally, we outline promising research directions for realizing scalable, efficient, and sustainable on-orbit MoE inference in future satellite networks.

</details>


### [620] [Escape from Callback Hell! A New Programming Paradigm for Network Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16897)
*Yuanyi Zhu,Zijian Li,Xin Ai,Zixuan Chen,Sen Liu,Yang Xu*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出基于协程的新型网络仿真开发范式CoDES，通过将回调机制改为协程，解决了传统离散事件仿真中因回调导致的代码复杂度高、维护性差等问题。在NS-3上应用后，实现MPI、HPCC、RIP等功能，代码量和结构复杂度分别减少62.3%和82.6%，且不牺牲仿真精度或增加运行时开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统离散事件仿真基于回调机制，无法自然地模拟网络事件，导致程序无法以顺序工作流编写，产生栈撕裂和回调地狱问题，增加了仿真开发工作量和编程调试的认知负荷。

Method: 提出CoDES（基于协程的离散事件仿真）范式，利用协程机制自然模拟网络事件，使开发者能以顺序工作流编写网络程序，简化代码结构。在NS-3上实现MPI、HPCC、RIP等协议验证其有效性。

Result: 在NS-3上实现MPI、HPCC和RIP，代码量减少62.3%，结构复杂度减少82.6%，且不牺牲仿真精度、不增加执行时间和运行时内存。

Conclusion: CoDES通过协程机制优化网络仿真开发过程（而非性能），有效解决了回调导致的开发效率问题，为网络仿真提供了更高效、可维护的新范式。

Abstract: Network simulation plays a crucial role in both networking research and industry. Existing commonly-used Discrete Event Simulations (DES) are based on callback mechanisms for discrete event (DE). However, due to the inability of callbacks to naturally simulate network events, programs in network simulation cannot be written in a sequential workflow. This leads to inherent complexity and poor maintainability, resulting in stack ripping and callback hell. These problems significantly increase simulation development workloads and introduce substantial cognitive loads associated with programming and debugging.
  To enable more efficient development of network simulation and facilitate the rapid evaluation and evolution of network functions, we propose a novel development paradigm for network simulation named ``CoDES" (\textbf{Co}routine-based \textbf{DES}). To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to focus on optimizing the network simulation development process rather than performance based on the coroutine mechanism. We implement a new network simulation framework based on CoDES that is capable of naturally simulating network events and effectively address key system challenges related to correctness, functionality, compatibility, and overhead. It enables developers to create sequential workflows for network programs and simplifies the code structure, thus reducing development workloads while enhancing code readability and maintainability.
  We apply this paradigm to a commonly used network simulator, NS-3 to implement Message Passing Interface (MPI), High Precision Congestion Control (HPCC), and Routing Information Protocol (RIP), achieving up to 62.3\% and 82.6\% reduction in code volume and structure complexity without sacrificing simulation accuracy, extending execution time or increasing runtime memory of simulation.

</details>


### [621] [Resilience Analysis in Off-Grid LoRa Mesh Networks: Evaluation of Meshtastic Profiles in Long-Range Propagation Scenarios](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17063)
*Guillermo Antonio Hernandez Ortiz,Edgar Santiago Quiroz Puentes,José de Jesús Rugeles*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文通过受控引导链路实验，系统评估了Meshtastic固件在915 MHz频段下8种调制预设与3种发射功率组合的性能表现，揭示了以扩频因子为主导的性能分区规律，并基于路径衰减阈值定义了三种城市部署场景的操作模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在智慧城市应急场景中，LoRa mesh网络（如Meshtastic）无需传统基础设施即可提供去中心化通信，但缺乏针对实际部署场景（如哥伦比亚915 MHz ISM频段）的系统化设计与规划准则，本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 采用受控引导链路（controlled guided-link）方法，隔离LoRa物理层与传播效应，在实验室内对Meshtastic全部8种调制预设（modem presets）在3种发射功率水平下进行确定性表征，共采集42组数据集。

Result: 1) "Short"预设（SF7-SF8）在110-120 dB路径衰减下失效；"Medium"预设（SF9-SF10）可维持135-150 dB链路；"Long"预设（SF11-SF12）覆盖能力最强，其中"Long Slow"可达180 dB。2) SF12可在信噪比低至-18 dB时解调，链路失效发生在理论极限的2-4 dB范围内。

Conclusion: 基于实验阈值定义了三种操作模式（高密度IoT、平衡城市网格、最大范围应急），为智慧城市部署提供了量化选型准则。

Abstract: The integration of LoRa technologies with mesh topologies represents a robust alternative for off-grid communications in emergency scenarios within smart cities. Meshtastic firmware implements a decentralised mesh network over LoRa where each node acts simultaneously as end device and router, enabling communication via Bluetooth-connected mobile devices without reliance on conventional infrastructure. Within the Colombian context (915 MHz ISM band), this work establishes design and planning criteria through a controlled guided-link methodology that isolates the LoRa physical layer from propagation effects, enabling deterministic characterisation of all eight Meshtastic modem presets at three transmission power levels (42 datasets). The results reveal a performance partitioning governed primarily by Spreading Factor (SF): "Short" presets (SF7-SF8) fail at 110-120 dB of path attenuation, "Medium" presets (SF9-SF10) sustain links up to 135-150 dB, and "Long" presets (SF11-SF12) maximise coverage, with "Long Slow" reaching 180 dB before failure - a 60-70 dB advantage over the fastest profiles. The SNR analysis confirms sub-noise-floor demodulation down to -18 dB for SF12, with abrupt link failure occurring within 2-4 dB of the theoretical limit. Based on these thresholds, three operational regimes are defined (high-density IoT, balanced urban mesh, and maximum-range emergency), providing network designers with quantitative criteria to select the appropriate configuration and node density for smart city deployments.

</details>


### [622] [An Efficient Machine Learning-based Framework for Detection and Prevention of Frauds in Telecom Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17245)
*Praveen Hegde,Mishal Shah*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文利用电信CDR数据集（101,174条记录，含8,830个欺诈案例），通过SMOTE平衡数据、Min-Max缩放预处理后，比较RF（准确率99.9%）和XGBoost（99.7%）等模型在电信欺诈检测中的表现，发现随机森林在准确率、精确率、召回率和F1-score上均达99.9%，为最优模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电信欺诈导致重大经济损失并威胁系统可靠性，现有检测方法存在局限，需要更高效、准确的AI驱动检测机制来应对不断变化的欺诈手段。

Method: 采用Telecom CDR数据集（101,174条记录，17个属性），进行缺失值处理、Min-Max缩放和SMOTE过采样平衡；使用随机森林和XGBoost进行预测建模，并与DBSCAN、RoBERTa、K-means、GNN、BERT等模型对比；以F1-score、ROC AUC、召回率、准确率、时间和精确率作为评估指标。

Result: 随机森林表现最佳：准确率99.9%、精确率99.9%、召回率99.9%、F1-score99.9%；XGBoost准确率99.7%；误分类极少。

Conclusion: 随机森林是电信网络欺诈检测中最有效的模型，能实现稳健可靠的欺诈预防，框架成功实现高精度检测。

Abstract: Telecommunication fraud is an acute problem that leads to substantial material losses and compromises the reliability of telecom systems worldwide. Only effective and efficient detection mechanisms can help to deal with these threats, though there are certain shifts in the approaches to fraud detection. This paper evaluates the performance of AI-driven models for fraud detection in telecommunication networks using Call Detail Record (CDR) datasets. This study focuses on fraud detection in telecom networks using the Telecom CDR dataset, which contains 101,174 customer records with 17 attributes, including 8,830 fraud cases. In feature preprocessing, missing values were dealt with, followed by data scaling using Min-Max scaling and data balancing using the SMOTE technique. The dataset was trained for predictive analysis using Random Forest (RF) and XGBoost models. F1-score, ROC AUC, recall, accuracy, time, and precision were used as indicators with which to compare performance of the two models. RF recorded a high level of accuracy at 99.9% while XGBoost at 99.7%. Findings show that the suggested framework successfully detects fraud with few misclassifications. Several machine learning models were evaluated and contrasted, such as RF, XGBoost, DBSCAN, RoBERTa, and K-means. Among all the models, RF was seen to give the highest performance with an accuracy of 99.9% and precision of 99.9%, recall of 99.9% and F1-score of 99.9%, XGBoost, GNN and BERT. The findings emphasize RF as the most effective model for detecting fraudulent activities in telecom networks, ensuring robust and reliable prevention of fraud.

</details>


### [623] [Wi-Fi HaLow (IEEE 802.11ah) for Long-Range Monitoring Links: Point-to-Point NLoS/LoS and LoS Mesh Field Characterization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17349)
*Jiajie Xu,Chaabane Mankai,Mohamed-Slim Alouini*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文对Wi-Fi HaLow（IEEE 802.11ah）在三种部署场景下的实际性能进行了现场测试：非视距点对点链路、视距点对点长距离链路以及视距中继网状网络。实验使用商用HaLow节点传输约30秒视频文件，测量了应用层吞吐量和延迟。结果表明：(a) 带宽与距离存在明显权衡，非视距覆盖边界约120米；(b) 视距下单跳最远814米，吞吐量低至0.15 Mbps；(c) 使用固定中继可扩展至千米级，两跳达901米，三跳达1110米。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 环境监测部署需要可靠的远距离无线链路来间歇性上传传感器日志和短视频快照，而Wi-Fi HaLow因其低于1 GHz的传播特性和灵活带宽的PHY模式成为一种有前景的候选方案。本文旨在通过现场测试填补实际部署场景下HaLow性能数据的空白。

Method: 本文围绕三种部署场景进行现场测试：(i) 点对点非视距链路；(ii) 点对点视距链路（数百米距离）；(iii) 带固定中继节点的视距网状网络。使用商用HaLow dongle级节点，通过传输约30秒视频文件（代表"重型"对象）来测量应用层吞吐量和面向监测的更新延迟。

Result: (a) 存在明显的带宽-距离权衡，非视距覆盖边界约120米；(b) 视距下单跳传输距离最远达814米，最远点吞吐量仅0.15 Mbps；(c) 使用固定中继可实现千米级扩展，两跳中继达901米，三跳中继达1110米。

Conclusion: Wi-Fi HaLow在监测部署中展现出实用潜力：支持非视距短距离通信和视距长距离传输，且通过固定中继可进一步扩展覆盖范围至千米级。但存在带宽-距离的固有权衡，实际部署需根据场景需求平衡距离与吞吐量。

Abstract: Monitoring deployments often require reliable long-range wireless links to intermittently upload sensor logs and short video snapshots. Wi-Fi HaLow (IEEE~802.11ah) is a promising candidate due to sub-1 GHz propagation and bandwidth-flexible PHY modes. This summary paper reports a field characterization organized around three deployment-driven regimes: (i) point-to-point Non-Line-of-Sight (NLoS) links; (ii) point-to-point Line-of-Sight (LoS) links over several-hundred-meter distances; and (iii) LoS mesh networking with fixed relay nodes for range extension. Using commodity HaLow dongle-class nodes in all regimes, we report application-layer goodput and monitoring-centric update latency based on transferring a representative ``heavy'' object (a $\sim$30 s video file). The measurements reveal (a) a clear bandwidth--range tradeoff and an NLoS coverage boundary around $\sim$120 m, (b) gradual throughput decay under LoS up to 814 m in single-hop with 0.15 Mbps at the farthest point, and (c) kilometer-class extension under LoS when fixed relays are introduced, reaching 901 m (two fixed relays) and 1110 m (three fixed relays

</details>


### [624] [Enhancing Network Resilience via Graph-Based Anomaly Detection in Sovereign Functions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17716)
*Xin Hao,Wei Ni,Chenhan Zhang,Massimo Piccardi,Raymond Owen*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出GSID模型，将协议配置异常检测转化为二分图结构不一致性问题，采用自适应编码器(ACE)和动态注意力机制(IDA)，在F1分数上比基线方法提升三倍，准确率提升23.2%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 网络路由协议等主权网络功能日益复杂，容易因协议配置异常（anomalous configurations）导致故障。现有方法难以有效检测这类结构性不一致问题。

Method: 提出GSID模型：(1) 将问题建模为二分图（物理网络实体+逻辑协议状态）的结构不一致性检测；(2) 自适应配置编码器(ACE)动态选择编码策略以保留细粒度数值差异；(3) 不一致性动态注意力机制(IDA)从规则合规性和路由连通性两端非对称地给边打分。

Result: GSID在F1分数上比最先进基线方法提升三倍，准确率提升23.2%。消融实验验证了ACE和IDA模块的有效性。在未见过的网络规模和真实网络拓扑上展现出优异的适应性。

Conclusion: GSID作为一种图结构不一致性检测器，有效解决了协议配置异常检测问题，其ACE和IDA模块对异构参数和细微不一致性具有很好的处理能力，且泛化能力优于现有方法。

Abstract: Sovereign network functions, e.g., routing protocols, are becoming increasingly complex and susceptible to failures arising from protocol configuration anomalies and anomalous configurations. This paper interprets the protocol configuration anomaly detection problem as detection of structural inconsistencies of connected nodes and edges in a bipartite graph that captures both physical network entities and logical protocol states. This graph structural inconsistency detector (GSID) model is proposed to solve the problem efficiently. To handle the heterogeneous nature of protocol configuration parameters, GSID employs an adaptive configuration encoder (ACE) that dynamically selects encoding strategies per parameter to preserve fine-grained numerical discrepancies. To expose the subtle inconsistencies of connected nodes and edges in the bipartite graph, GSID uses an inconsistency dynamic attention (IDA) mechanism that scores edges by drawing asymmetric attentions from both ends, rule compliance from one end and route connectivity from the other. It is demonstrated experimentally that GSID outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by threefold in F1 score and by 23.2% in accuracy. Ablation studies validate the effectiveness of both the ACE and IDA modules. Tests on unseen network scales and real-world network topologies show the superior adaptability of our GSID, compared to the baselines.

</details>


### [625] [CA3D: Computing Accessibility-Aware Cooperative 3D Deployment of Multiple UAVs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17852)
*Yiqin Deng,Zihan Fang,Yijie Wang,Qingxiao Huang,Junhui Gao,Qianyao Ren,Yuguang Fang*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出CA3D方法，通过计算可达性感知的多无人机协同3D部署，显著提升延迟约束任务完成概率，在热点和随机地面用户分布下均优于随机、固定和贪心基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无人机部署方法未充分考虑计算可达性对延迟约束任务完成的影响，缺乏对计算资源可达性与部署间距之间权衡的理论分析。

Method: 先理论分析计算可达性与无人机部署间距的权衡关系，再设计协同3D部署方案，联合优化可访问计算容量、任务完成概率和冗余重叠。

Result: 热点分布下任务完成概率提升约3.3倍（8架无人机），随机分布下比最佳基线高约35%（12架无人机），对地面用户分布变化具有鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 计算可达性感知的协同3D部署不仅能提升任务完成率，还能增强对地面用户分布变化的鲁棒性。

Abstract: This letter investigates computing-accessibility-aware cooperative 3D deployment of multiple UAVs for task completion enhancement, termed CA3D. We first provide a theoretical analysis showing that computing accessibility is the key mechanism linking UAV deployment to delay-constrained task completion, and that UAV inter-spacing creates a fundamental tradeoff between computing-resource accessibility and task completion. We then develop a cooperative 3D deployment design that jointly balances accessible computing capacity, task completion probability, and redundant UAV overlap. Simulation results under heterogeneous computing node capacities show that CA3D consistently outperforms Random, Fixed, and Greedy deployment baselines under both hotspot and random ground user (GU) distributions. Under the hotspot GU distribution, CA3D achieves nearly full task completion, improving the task completion probability by about 3.3x over Random deployment when the number of UAVs is 8. Under a more challenging random GU distribution, CA3D still achieves about 35% higher task completion probability than the best baseline when the number of UAVs is 12. These results demonstrate that computing-accessibility-aware cooperative 3D deployment improves not only task completion but also robustness to GU distribution changes.

</details>


### [626] [ASTRA: Asynchronous Age-Aware Satellite Random Access via Mean-Field Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18282)
*Sayam Chakraborty,Aimin Li,Yigit Ince,Sajjad Baghaee,Elif Uysal*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出ASTRA框架，针对卫星物联网上行链路中异步随机接入的AoI优化问题，结合物理层捕获和SIC特性，构建平均场MDP模型，证明最优策略存在年龄阈值结构，仿真验证其优于年龄无关基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 卫星物联网中免授权上行接入导致新鲜度控制问题复杂：增加重复传输和接收分集虽能提升设备捕获-SIC机会，但加剧网络拥塞，损害全局AoI。现有AoI感知随机接入模型多依赖时隙同步碰撞、固定交付概率或标量传输/等待决策，无法刻画带捕获和SIC的异步卫星上行链路。

Method: 提出ASTRA框架：1) 构建接入模型，刻画异步到达、部分重叠、捕获和SIC特性，并保持交付成功率对设备重复-分集动作的依赖；2) 将群体交互建模为可扩展的平均场MDP，设备仅依赖本地AoI观测优化接入时机和强度；3) 证明系统存在平均场均衡，且最优均衡策略具有年龄阈值结构。

Result: 数值结果表明，所提策略相比年龄无关基线显著降低了AoI。

Conclusion: 本文为卫星物联网异步随机接入中的新鲜度控制提供了理论框架，证明了年龄阈值最优策略的存在性，并验证了其有效性。

Abstract: Satellite Internet-of-Things (IoT) enables massive status-update services beyond terrestrial coverage, but grant-free uplink access creates a coupled freshness-control problem: increasing repetition and receiver-side diversity improves a device's capture-SIC opportunities, yet the resulting population congestion degrades network-wide freshness. Existing AoI-aware random-access models often rely on slot-synchronous collisions, fixed delivery probabilities, or scalar transmit-or-wait decisions and therefore cannot capture asynchronous satellite uplinks with capture and SIC. This paper develops a PHY-aware mean-field framework, termed ASTRA (Asynchronous Age-Aware Satellite Random Access), for freshness-driven satellite IoT random access. We build an access model that captures asynchronous arrivals, partial overlaps, capture, and SIC while preserving the dependence of delivery success on each device's repetition-diversity action. We then formulate the population interaction as a scalable mean-field MDP in which devices optimize access timing and intensity using only local AoI observations. The resulting system admits a mean-field equilibrium in which individual optimality and endogenous congestion are mutually consistent. We further prove that the optimal equilibrium policy admits an age-threshold structure. Numerical results show that the proposed policy reduces AoI relative to age-independent baselines.

</details>


### [627] [Enabling Agile Ambient IoT Networking via a Parameterized Hybrid Radio](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18314)
*Jiazhen Lei,Fengyuan Zhu,Tianze Cao,Yuxin Sha,Linling Zhong,Wenhui Li,Bingbing Wang,Zeming Yang,Jinyang Sun,Yibin Deng,Xiaohua Tian*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: Janus是一个首个混合有源-无源可配置射频架构，通过参数化设计统一有源和无源传输，实现敏捷的Ambient IoT组网，性能与专用无线电相当但配置开销显著降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前Ambient IoT面临缺乏灵活物理层基板的根本性障碍，现有测试平台受限于解耦射频路径、高静态功耗和笨拙的控制方法，无法支持快速协议原型开发。

Method: 提出Janus架构，采用参数化设计将无源和有源传输统一到单一射频前端，将复杂物理层行为抽象为简洁参数，并设计系统级控制平面和能量管理平面。

Result: 在紧凑PCB原型上评估，涵盖3GPP A-IoT、IEEE 802.11 AMP和Bluetooth SIG等多种协议，通信性能与专用无线电相当，配置开销显著降低。

Conclusion: Janus是验证新兴协议和加速下一代低功耗网络标准化的多功能使能器。

Abstract: The emergence of Ambient IoT signals a paradigm shift toward massive batteryless networking. However, the absence of an agile physical layer substrate remains a fundamental barrier to research and standardization. Current testbeds are hindered by decoupled radio paths, high static power, and cumbersome control methods, which stifle rapid protocol prototyping. In this paper, we present Janus, the first hybrid active-passive configurable radio architected for agile Ambient IoT networking. Janus introduces a parameterized architecture that unifies passive and active transmission into a single RF front end, abstracting complex physical layer behaviors into concise parameters. This design enables a system-level control plane for dynamic mode transitions and an energy management plane for fine-grained harvesting across multiple sources. We implement a compact PCB prototype and evaluate its performance across diverse protocol landscapes, including 3GPP A-IoT, IEEE 802.11 AMP, and Bluetooth SIG. Our experimental results demonstrate that Janus achieves communication performance on par with dedicated radios while significantly reducing configuration overhead. Ultimately, Janus serves as a versatile enabler for validating emerging protocols and accelerating the standardization of next-generation low-power networks.

</details>


### [628] [Collaborative Air-Ground Sensing, Communication, Computing, Storage, and Intelligence for Low-Altitude Economy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18503)
*Yiqin Deng,Junhui Gao,Zihan Fang,Yanan Ma,Xianhao Chen,Yuguang Fang*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文探讨低空经济（LAE）中感知、通信、计算、存储与智能（SCCSI）多资源协同问题，提出任务驱动、闭环调度的框架，涵盖场景-需求矩阵、空地协同架构及优化方法论，并综述使能技术、测试平台与未来挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低空经济具有任务中心、安全合规要求严苛的特点，传统仅靠通信优化的思路无法满足需求，必须通过空地协同实现多资源（SCCSI）联合编排，因此需要系统性的框架来指导设计。

Method: 提出一个三层次框架：①LAE场景与需求-资源耦合矩阵；②空地协同架构；③SCCSI联合优化与在线决策的方法工具箱。并基于此框架系统综述关键技术和端到端权衡。

Result: 建立了从应用需求到任务驱动优化设计的映射关系，总结了现有测试平台、数据集与评估指标，并通过典型用例展示了框架的有效性。

Conclusion: 低空经济需要可扩展且可信赖的部署，未来面临开放性挑战，本文提供了向此目标发展的路线图。

Abstract: Low-altitude economy (LAE) is transforming low-altitude airspace into a new cyber-physical infrastructure. Although air-ground communications have been widely studied, LAE is fundamentally different in the sense that it is mission-centric with diverse requirements, such as stringent safety and compliance constraints not be effectively addressed with a communication-centric design alone, which makes air-ground collaboration indispensable: Only through effectively coordinating air-ground infrastructure and resources can LAE missions be fulfilled. Consequently, LAE calls for task-driven, closed-loop, multi-resource orchestration of Sensing, Communication, Computing, Storage, and Intelligence (SCCSI), where key decisions must be co-designed under mobility and uncertainty. In this paper, we first present a novel framework that connects (i) LAE scenarios and a requirement--resource coupling matrix, (ii) an air--ground collaborative architecture, and (iii) methodological toolboxes for SCCSI co-optimization and online decision-making. We then systematically review enabling technologies for collaborative SCCSI resources and capabilities, emphasizing their coupling and end-to-end tradeoffs. Finally, we summarize testbeds, datasets, and evaluation metrics, and provide representative use cases to illustrate how the proposed framework translates application requirements into practical task-driven optimization designs, together with open challenges and a roadmap toward scalable and trustworthy LAE deployment.

</details>
